title: Account Executive - Stockholm
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re looking for an
 **Account Executive** 
 to help drive and grow our footprint across the Swedish region. You’ll be at the forefront of introducing Tandem’s clinician copilot to providers, partners, and health systems - shaping how we scale across Sweden.
   

  

 In this position, you will actively represent Tandem at trade fairs, events, and in direct conversations with physicians, doctors, and decision-makers. You contribute to our mission where it matters most - into personal contact with our future partners. Your goal is to position our solutions in the market, drive new business, and strengthen existing relationships.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Actively acquire new customers through a combination of outbound efforts (cold calling, appointment setting, product demos, negotiations, and closing) and partner-led sales in close collaboration with commercial partners, with both channels being equally important for success.
* Drive and contribute to public tender processes, ensuring high-quality submissions and strategic positioning; prior experience working with public tenders is highly desirable.
* Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with a diverse group of stakeholders, including end-users (such as social workers, medical nurses, and student health professionals), key decision-makers, and commercial partners.
* Develop a deep understanding of end-user needs and pain points, demonstrating a genuine interest in improving their day-to-day work and outcomes.
* Represent Tandem Health at trade fairs, conferences, and industry events, acting as an ambassador for our mission, solutions, and long-term vision.
* Strategically plan and execute sales initiatives to effectively penetrate and grow within the Swedish market, with a focus on building sustainable, long-term partnerships rather than short-term wins.
* Collaborate closely with SDR, marketing, product, customer success, and partner teams to incorporate market feedback and continuously improve the customer experience and offering.
* Use digital GTM tools and CRM systems to manage leads, opportunities, and partnerships in a structured, transparent way.


**What You Bring**
* Demonstrated multi-year successful sales experience, ideally gained in the SaaS, technology or healthcare sector.
* Strong communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to deliver compelling presentations to diverse audiences.
* Prior experience driving and / or contributing to public tender processes would be highly beneficial in this role.
* A high level of initiative, a structured approach to work, and a passion for embracing challenges in a dynamic environment.
* Native level in Swedish and fluent in English, with excellent communication skills, both written and spoken.
* Passion for improving healthcare delivery through thoughtful, impactful innovation.


**Bonus Points**
* Experience working with or selling into EHR providers, health systems, or care delivery platforms.
* Background in medtech, digital health, or regulated software.
* A completed degree in business administration, healthcare management, or a comparable qualification.
* Experience in startup or high-growth environments, especially launching new markets.


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This is a
 **full-time role based in Stockholm** 
 where you will work primarily in order to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 Our interview process consists of stages:
   

  

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* First interview with Head of Commercial Excellence
* Second interview with our Country Director
* Working Day - Join us in the Stockholm office for a day to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Security Specialist - Tieto Tech Consulting (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
 Som Security Specialist på Tieto Tech Consulting kommer du att ingå i ett expanderande team i en utvecklande miljö. I din konsultroll kommer du att ingå i ett team på 20st personer med varierande kompetens inom roller som projektledare, arkitekter och mjukvaruutvecklare.
   

  

 Du kommer att få möjlighet att arbeta med att designa, utveckla, säkra och underhålla kunders IT-system och skapa bra förutsättningar för dessa att fungera ur informations och driftsäkerhetssynpunkt. Arbetet innehåller bland annat att kontinuerligt genomföra förbättringar av IT-säkerheten. I rollen som Security Specialist kommer du att få arbeta med uppdrag både in-house och ute hos kund samt vara med och förenkla vardagen för många människor.
   

  

 Hos Tieto finns det stora möjligheter till utveckling. Du får arbeta med meningsfulla projekt i en öppen organisationskultur där kompetensutbyte uppskattas. Vi jobbar i grunden med agile application development, virtualization & DevOps. Vi levererar lösningar till kunder med mycket höga krav på informationssäkerhet och driftsäkerhet.
   

  

**Skallkrav**
* Akademisk utbildning inom mjukvaruutveckling, IT-säkerhet eller motsvarande
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av arbete med IT-system med inriktning på säkerhet, gärna med deltagande i hela produktlivscykeln från start till mål.
* Flytande svenska och engelska både i tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av att designa, implementera och drifta säkerhetslösningar.
* Säkerhetsklassade projekt
* Relevanta certifieringar CompTIA Security+, CCNA, CCNP, CCSP, CISSP.
* Internationella säkerhetsstandarder såsom GDPR, NIS2, ISO 27001
* Processer och metoder i IT-säkerhetsarbetet
* IAM & Cryptography
* Säkerhetsprotokoll
* Säkerhetsfunktioner, exempelvis Brandväggar, IDS, IPS, XDR
* SIEM / SOC expertis
* Sårbarhetshantering
* Windows & Linux Servers
* Virtualisering
* Molntjänster
* DevOps / DevSecOps practices
* Produktutveckling
* Scripting (Bash, PowerShell, python)


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Du är en person som är driven, nyfiken och initiativtagande. Att samarbeta tillsammans med ditt team ser du som en självklarhet. Du brinner för att lösa kundproblem och vill stötta dem på bästa möjliga sätt in i framtidens IT. Du gillar att utvecklas både i ditt arbete och som person.
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Applikationstekniker inom Linux
description:
*Redo att hitta din grej? Testa nytt, utbyt erfarenheter och upptäck vad du verkligen gillar att göra.*
 Din roll
   

  

 Group IT är en del av Saab med globalt ansvar för utveckling, drift och hantering av företagets gemensamma IT-miljöer. Inom Business Applications arbetar vi med styrning, affärsutveckling och förvaltning av IS/IT-området, med ett primärt IT-ansvar för stora utvecklingsprojekt och R&D-förmåga. Sektionen Software Enablement ansvarar för livscykelhantering och packning av applikationer samt intag av free open source software. Idag ingår cirka 20 personer i sektionen och verksamheten är fördelad över tre team. På arbetsplatsen finns en prestigelös kultur där man är professionell och engagerad, respekterar, stöttar och lär av varandra.
   

  

 Teamet Application Provisioning är en del av Software Enablement och söker nu en applikationstekniker med fokus på Linux. Rollen tillsätts i syfte att stärka vår kompetens och utveckla våra arbetssätt inom applikationsdistribution på Linuxplattformar.
   

  

 Som medlem i teamet förväntas du bidra till en positiv och samarbetsorienterad arbetsmiljö där vi stöttar varandra för att nå gemensamma mål. Vi tar ansvar, arbetar proaktivt och driver våra uppgifter framåt med engagemang. Tillsammans skapar vi en trivsam arbetsplats där välbefinnande och arbetsglädje är en självklar del av vardagen.
   

  

 Tjänsten kan innebära inrikes resor, uppskattningsvis någon gång per månad.
   

  

 Teamet arbetsuppgifter är bland annat:
   

  

* Paketering för merparten av Saabs Windowsapplikationer
* Publicering av applikationerna så att de är beställningsbara för Saabs medarbetare.
* Underhåll av Saab’s Citrixmiljöer samt infrastruktur för Cloudpaging.
* Utveckling av tjänsten Application Provisioning i sin helhet


 Din profil
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen behöver du vara proaktiv, kunna prioritera samt ha en god förmåga att kommunicera både internt inom teamet och till kund. Vidare tror vi att du har ett kundorienterat fokus, med ett bra analytiskt och lösningsfokuserat tänk. Du är en lagspelare men även van att arbeta självständigt. För att trivas hos oss behöver du vara framåtsträvande och service-minded och tycka om att arbeta i en miljö där förutsättningarna kan förändras med kort varsel utifrån användarnas behov.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av arbete i:
   

  

* Linuxmiljöer, exempelvis Ubuntu, Debian eller Red Hat Enterprise Linux, med god kunskap inom pakethantering och applikationsdistribution.
* Du har erfarenhet av både traditionella paketsystem (DEB/RPM) och universella lösningar som Flatpak. Du har förståelse för bygg- och distributionsprocesser samt vana av verktyg som Ansible. Vidare har du kunskap inom scriptning, främst i Bash och gärna även i Python.
* Du är trygg i att hantera beroenden, felsöka installationer och säkerställa kvalitet och funktionalitet i distribuerade applikationer.
* Erfarenhet av versionshantering (Git) samt arbete med automatiserade bygg- och deployflöden (CI/CD) är meriterande, liksom kunskap om containerteknik såsom Docker.


 Som person är du strukturerad, noggrann och lösningsorienterad. Du har en god samarbetsförmåga och trivs med att arbeta nära både utvecklings- och driftteam. Vi ser även att du har goda kunskaper i såväl svenska som engelska i både tal och skrift är ett krav.
   

  

 Placeringsort är flexibelt mellan Stockholm, Göteborg, Linköping, Jönköping, Malmö och Lund.
   

  

*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. Befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med syfte att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidra till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 28 000 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här
   

  

*Med tanke på den kommande semesterperioden kan du förvänta dig återkoppling på din ansökan efter sommaren. Om du tycker att tjänsten låter intressant är du varmt välkommen att skicka in din ansökan redan idag!*

title: Business Development Manager
description:
**BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT MANAGER** 




  





 We have invented a solar cell technology that enables endless energy, Powerfoyle. Not only will it change the world, but it also means you will work with leading technology, science, and machines – all under the same roof in our urban factories. We are passionate about the potential of our technology to make products better and easier to use. We build the next generation of clean green industry and unite in the vision of touching the lives of a billion people.
 



  





**WHO WE ARE** 




 We are on an exciting journey to bring our groundbreaking solar cell technology to the world. A novel technology means that most of what we do has never been done before. It’s challenging to create something new, and at Exeger we embrace that challenge with grit and passion, because we know that what we do matters.
 



  





**YOU WILL DO** 




 You'll help shape the commercial future of Exeger by:
 


* Identifying and developing new market, product, and sales opportunities to drive business growth.
* Building strategic relationships with leading global OEMs and managing key customer engagements.
* Understanding customer strategies and long-term roadmaps to translate needs into commercial opportunities and revenue growth.
* Developing business cases, value propositions, and go-to-market plans in collaboration with customers and internal stakeholders.
* Working closely with Product, R&D, and Manufacturing to shape future products and deliver customer value.
* Representing Exeger globally at customer meetings, conferences, and trade shows while contributing to the company's commercial strategy and international expansion.



  





**WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?** 




 You probably have a few years of experience from Business Development, Product Management, Technical Sales, Management Consulting or a similar commercial role.
 



 More importantly, you're someone who:
 



  




* Intellectually curious, with a genuine passion for technology, innovation, and their commercial potential.
* Able to connect technology, business objectives, and customer needs to identify opportunities and create value.
* Analytical, commercially minded, and structured, with a strong focus on execution and results.
* An excellent communicator who thrives in international environments and builds relationships across diverse stakeholders.
* Proactive and confident in challenging assumptions, bringing new ideas and perspectives to the table.



  





**WHY EXEGER** 




 We are on an exciting journey to bring our groundbreaking solar cell technology to the world. Sprung out of the solid Swedish industrial heritage, we are now in the stage of industrializing at scale to create real, impactful change. We embrace differences and our behaviours are all about being curious, determined, responsible and being yourself. We are passionate about our technology and being part of building the next generation of clean green industry.
 



  





**WHAT NOW** 




 Please send your application via Exeger’s career page no later than 10th of August.
 



  





**MORE ABOUT EXEGER & OUR CULTURE** 




 In 2009, we started our journey to create world-changing solar cells to improve everyday life. Exeger is a Swedish manufacturing company with a unique solar cell technology that converts all forms of light into electrical energy. With its resilient and flexible design, the material named Powerfoyle™ can be seamlessly integrated into all products that benefit from being self-powered. Our culture is what holds us together, it’s our DNA. It’s who we are and what we’re not. It’s why we do things the Exeger way and why that matters. We are pioneers. We break new ground and push boundaries that others did not know existed. Our culture is based on trust, courage and motion.

title: Brand lead
description:
Ready to make a paws-itive impact in the pet world? Join Lassie, the InsurTech company taking the Swedish, German, and French pet markets by storm! We're on a mission to provide the best pet insurance solutions out there. Our goal? To ensure every furry friend gets the care they deserve, and their owners get peace of mind.
 


  


 As we set our sights on expanding, we’re on the hunt for an Brand lead to join us. If you're ready to embark on an adventure with us and help revolutionize pet insurance, we want to hear from you!
 


  


 This position is placed at our office in Stockholm where we apply a hybrid work model with the opportunity to work from home 2 days per week. You will be reporting directly to Chief Growth Officier.
 


  

 Tasks
   


 You'll lead Lassie's internal brand team - leading the strategy that shapes who we are, and driving the work that brings it to life. As Brand Lead, you'll build the framework and "look & feel" behind everything Lassie does, and make sure it lands just as strongly in Stockholm as it does in Berlin or Paris. Working closely with our founders and Chief Growth Officer, you'll play a lead role in how Lassie shows up as we scale fast across Europe.
 


  


 In this role you will:
 


  

  
* Develop and personally drive an integrated brand strategy that strengthens Lassie’s positioning, brand awareness and long-term brand equity across markets.
  
* Own and evolve Lassie’s brand identity, communication, and visual design, ensuring consistency across all touchpoints, while allowing for local market relevance.
  
* Lead and actively contribute to creative development, from ideation and art direction to execution of innovative campaigns and compelling brand experiences across all online and offline channels.
  
* Build and maintain a centralised brand framework, translating it into scalable guidelines and toolkits for local Brand Marketing Managers.
  
* Work closely with local teams in Sweden, Germany and France to support market activations and ensure strong brand execution, adapting best practices for expansion and localization of the brand.
  
* Collaborate with Growth, CRM and Analytics teams to ensure brand initiatives support commercial objectives and measurable outcomes.
  
* Experiment with new formats, channels and creative approaches to continuously strengthen Lassie’s brand presence.
  
* Monitor brand performance and KPIs, adjusting strategies pragmatically to drive impact in a high-growth environment.
  


  

 Requirements
   

  
* 7+ years of experience in B2C brand-building marketing, ideally within high-growth scale-ups or entrepreneurial environments.
  
* Proven experience building, evolving or re-positioning a brand, ideally across multiple European markets.
  
* Strong hands-on experience in brand, communication and creative development, with a portfolio of impactful campaigns.
  
* Proven experience in developing and growing a brand community, creating meaningful interactions with customers through tailored content, events, and social media engagement to enhance brand loyalty and advocacy.
  
* Experience working with lean teams and external partners.
  
* Expertise in shaping and executing brand strategies that drive customer engagement and long-term growth.
  
* Proven ability to build and scale centralised brand systems while enabling effective local execution, considering cultural differences and consumer behavior.
  
* In-depth understanding of market research, trend analysis and customer insights to inform brand strategies.
  
* Strong project management and prioritisation skills in fast-moving environments.
  
* Excellent communication skills and full professional proficiency in English.

title: Key Account Manager IT
description:
*Att vara Key Account Manager hos oss innebär att kliva in i en central och affärskritisk roll där du får kombinera strategiskt tänkande, teknisk förståelse och relationsbyggande på hög nivå. Här får du arbeta nära några av våra viktigaste kunder, driva deras digitala utveckling framåt och skapa lösningar som gör verklig skillnad i deras verksamhet. Om du vill ha en roll där du både får påverka, utveckla och leverera resultat, samtidigt som du omges av kompetenta kollegor och ett starkt erbjudande, då är detta möjligheten du inte vill missa.* 




  





**Om rollen** 




 Vi söker en Key Account Manager med uppgift att förvalta, utveckla och stärka relationerna med våra befintliga storkunder samt identifiera och bearbeta nya potentiella kunder inom vårt affärsområde IT. Du kommer att vara en strategisk rådgivare som sätter dig in i kundens affär och översätter behov till lösningar som skapar långsiktigt värde. Rollen innebär bland annat:
 


* Utveckla långsiktiga kundrelationer.
* Vara kundens primära kontakt inom IT och digitala lösningar.
* Koordinera interna specialistteam för leverans mot kund.
* Identifiera och driva merförsäljning av tjänster, projekt och uppgraderingar.
* Säkerställa kvalitet i leveranser och kommunikation mot kund.
* Arbeta mot tydliga tillväxtmål och eget budgetansvar.



  





**Om dig** 




 Vi söker dig som är resultatinriktad och drivs av att skapa lönsamhet och tillväxt. Du är en vass förhandlare och kan självständigt driva affärer mot stora företag under längre säljcykler utan att tumma på kvaliteten. Du är relationsbyggande och van att ha många kontaktytor och parallellt hantera fler beslutsfattare hos samma kund. Du har ett långsiktigt tänk där struktur, noggrannhet och återkoppling är självklarheter i din vardag. Vidare tror vi att du har med dig följande:
 


* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av framgångsrik försäljning i en liknande roll ( t.ex. Key Account/ Large Account/ Major Account).
* Erfarenhet av tjänsteförsäljning.
* God förståelse för moderna IT-lösningar: molntjänster, säkerhet, nätverk, drift, digitalisering m.m.
* Vana att koordinera interna team och arbeta i tvärfunktionella miljöer.
* Förmåga att leda mindre projekt och strukturera leveranser.
* B-körkort



  





**Vårt erbjudande** 




 Vi må vara ett stort och globalt bolag – ja! Men här i Norden ser vi oss som ett sammansvetsat lag där alla är välkomna. Våra värdeord –
 *uppriktighet & kreativitet* 
 – har följt med oss sedan 1912 och finns med i allt vi gör. För oss innebär det att vi är inkluderande, ställer upp för varandra, hittar nya vägar och ser möjligheter även i motgångar. Det är vi (alla medarbetare på Sharp) som är vår kultur, det är vi som tillsammans växer och det är vi som är varandras arbetsmiljö!
 



  





 För att vi ska kunna växa tillsammans utbildar vi såväl ledare som medarbetare inom olika områden. Som medarbetare på Sharp är du bland annat en del av
 *Sharp Learning Forum* 
 där vi tillsammans utbildar varandra inom våra olika kompetensområden, allt för att skapa en högre kunskap och förståelse för varandras vardag!
 



  





 Vi skulle kunna prata på i en evighet om varför just du ska jobba hos oss, bland annat om vår tro på vikten av hälsa och balans i vardagen (där vi exempelvis erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag och friskvårdstimme), vårt brinnande engagemang för arbetsmiljö och hållbarhet eller att vi har en AW-grupp som för oss samman med roliga aktiviteter, men vi får pausa här och se fram emot att berätta mer i ett personligt möte!
 



  





**Om Sharp** 




 Sharp erbjuder lösningar för digitala arbetsplatser. Med vår gedigna erfarenhet, lokala förankring och breda kunskap levererar vi helhetslösningar för organisationer, oavsett bransch eller storlek. Det handlar om datorer, digitala möten och säker dokumenthantering till kompletta mötesrum, IT-drift, arbetsplatshantering och betallösningar. Vi säkerställer att företag alltid har rätt förutsättningar, utbildning och verktyg för att öka samarbete, kommunikation och säkerhet.

title: SAFETY & COMPLIANCE ENGINEER
description:
**We are looking for a Compliance and Safety Engineer**
 Are you excited about development, administration and maintenance of effective safety and compliance management? If so, the role as Compliance & Safety Engineer for SAS Link might be the perfect fit for you!
   

  

 In this role, you will be responsible for the processes as required by CAMO.A.305 and directly connected to SAS core value of keeping a safe operation. You will report directly to the SAS Link NPCA and Technical Director.
   

  

 SAS Link operates a fleet of 16 E195-E1, mainly operating in the Scandinavian intra-domestic market and is planned to expand to a fleet of 45 E195-E2 over the next 4 years.
   

  

**Challenges You Will Work On**
* Facilitate and co-ordinate hazard identification, risk assessment and management.
* Maintain the CAMO Hazard register.
* Monitor the implementation of actions taken to mitigate risks, as listed in the safety action plan.
* Coordinate Safety Action Group meetings including material and actions derived from them.
* Ensure that training is available, and that it meets acceptable standards.
* Review all SMS and HF feedback gleaned from recurrent training, and incorporate as appropriate into the recurrent training syllabus and training documentation.
* Provide advice on safety matters.
* Ensure the initiation, follow-up and due dates of internal occurrence investigations, hazard mitigations and compliance findings.2
* Provide oversight of the functioning of the occurrence reporting system.
* Analyze all occurrences collected in order to identify the safety hazards associated with identified occurrences or groups of occurrences.
* Maintain and coordinate training requirements, results and expiries for all CAMO personnel.
* Ensure at least annually that manuals remain relevant in accordance with regulatory requirements and AOC operations.
* Coordinate with external and internal auditors for audit preparations


**The Team**
 You will be part of a high-performing and diverse team composed of talented professionals from various backgrounds. Our team values collaboration, innovation, and a commitment to excellence. We support each other and thrive on creating a positive and inclusive work environment where everyone can succeed.
   

  

**To be successful we believe you have**
* Practical experience in the application of aviation maintenance standards and safe operating practices.
* Knowledge of regulations applicable to the Operator: Part M / Part CAMO / Part 145, Part.CAT.IDE.A / Part 26
* Knowledge of the AOC Compliance Monitoring and Safety systems.
* 3 years relevant work experience in the subject or similar role.
* An aeronautical degree or aircraft maintenance technician qualification (EASA Part 66 Licence)
* Knowledge of maintenance methods.
* Knowledge of applicable regulations and mandatory requirements.
* Have a fundamental understanding of the English language Competence within MS Office package, mainly Word, Excel and Outlook
* Knowledge of E1 and or E2 is a plus
* AMOS Basic Knowledge is a plus


 As a person, we believe you are proactive with strong planning, priority and organizational skills, have the ability to collect, handle and structure a large amount of information for data-driven decision making, and be able to keep sharp judgement skills in a fast changing and dynamic environment. We believe you have a strong attention to details, and problem solving and time management skills. Furthermore, you should be result driven and motivated by solving challenging situations, be able to communicate clearly with various stakeholders and act as a strong motivator and team player. We are also looking for an indivdual that can continuously evaluate and improve our and own work processes.
   

  

**Why SAS?**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.


**Our Culture at SAS**
 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. At SAS we are part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

**Additional Information**
* Deadline for application: 31.07.26.
* Desired start date: 01.10.26.
* The position will be starting with a probation period of 6 months.
* A background check will be conducted at the final stage of this recruitment process, as this role is security classified. If you are aware of any specific matters that may come up during this background check, we kindly ask you to be transparent about them during the recruitment process.


 If you have questions about this position, you are welcome to contact Carlos D. Deutman, NPCT SAS Link, via email: Carlos.DiazDeutman@sas.se

title: Senior Banking Data & AI Manager
description:
There is never a typical day at Accenture, but that is why we love it here! This is an extraordinary opportunity to build a rewarding career at
 **Accenture Banking Technology Unit** 
 . Working in highly collaborative cross-border teams for world-leading clients, we will nurture your talent in an inclusive culture that values diversity.
   

  

 Whatever you are passionate about, make the most of it in a career with Accenture. Whether you are a strategic thinker, a digital innovator, a tech wizard, or a business problem solver, you will find an exciting career path on the cutting edge. We would love to get to know your unique blend of talents and help you explore and grow them further.
   

  

 Accenture Banking Technology Unit is part of the Accenture’s global capability network, and we serve several clients in Nordics and globally. Banking Technology is in the intersection of business and technology, and we have pure techies and more business-oriented people in the team. You’ll get access to Accenture’s vast knowledge base and experienced colleagues to help you to grow to next level on your professional career.
   

  

 We are now looking for
 **Senior Banking Data & AI Manager.** 
 As a manager, you will be leading Accenture teams, providing senior advisory and implementation services for our banking clients’ leaders and driving our growth in industry. Your main goal is to help our clients to succeed in their initiatives – no matter whether it is on planning or execution stage. Your detailed work description and responsibilities will be determined by your engagement.
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
- Ensure technical transformation is aligned with business goals and processes, and follows the architecture blueprints defined

- Banking data & AI expert within Accenture industry group

- Problem and issue solving, analysis and functional expertise

- Taking part or leading our sales and thought leadership pursuits within the industry

**Professional Requirements:**
- Bachelor’s or Master's degree from a technical or business school

- Ideally you would have at least 10 years of experience working in banking data & AI domain

- Experience on leading people and initiatives and delivering clear and inspiring stakeholder communication

- Strong business acumen & technical knowledge on the banking data & AI models and sources. We expect a strong understanding of data & AI from a business perspective, beyond seeing data as just technical attributes.

- We appreciate experience on the legacy data warehousing, data lake or modern cloud solutions. Databricks experience is seen as benefit.

- We are also looking for experience in scaling AI capabilities in financial services clients.

- Experience in Microsoft AI Foundry, AWS Bedrock, Gemini or Anthropic, as well as Agentic Architectures will be beneficial.

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

- High drive, entrepreneurial attitude and good interpersonal skills

- Excellent verbal and written communications skills in Swedish and English

- Important: We can consider only EU citizens or candidates already resident in Sweden.

**What Is In It For You**
- We believe in bringing the best to our clients through continuous learning & improvement – from basic skills to industry-specific content

- Mentoring and continuous evaluation that ensure your career continues to progress

- We offer a performance management process that focuses on your strengths, progress and career possibilities

- Flexible work arrangements for maintaining work-life balance

- Extensive wellbeing program, MyHealth that boosts your overall wellbeing, energy and ability to work in a sustainable way

- Opportunities to get involved in corporate citizenship initiatives, from volunteering to doing charity work, as well as Inclusion & Diversity networks

- International and cross-border expert teams guiding you in client engagements

**Interested?** 
 Make your move – apply online and attach your CV and letter of application in English. We look forward to receiving your application.
   

  

 All job ads will be reviewed in August. We encourage you to apply already in July, but please note that we will provide updates only from August onwards.

title: MARKETING AUTOMATION SPECIALIST
description:
**Marketing Automation Specialist**
 Do you love turning data into personalised experiences at scale? Are you someone who gets excited by a well-timed journey, a clean segment, and a test that actually teaches you something? If so, this might be exactly the right next step.
   

  

 As a Marketing Automation Specialist at SAS, you will independently own and evolve automated customer journeys and omnichannel communication flows – driving sales, loyalty and customer experience through data-driven, personalised engagement across email, SMS, push and beyond.
   

  

**Challenges You Will Work On**
 Design, build and continuously optimise automated customer journeys in Salesforce Marketing Cloud, leveraging data and audience insights to drive relevance and conversion. Execute calendar-based emails, SMS and push communication in line with the marketing plan. Configure audience selection with data-driven logic to reach the right customer at the right time. Design and execute A/B and multivariate testing strategies, translating results into concrete journey improvements. Collaborate with CRM Specialists to ensure relevant and personalised content, and act as an internal expert on journey automation best practices – contributing to how the team evolves its ways of working and tooling over time.
   

  

**The Team**
 You will be part of the Performance Management team, working closely with CRM Specialists, a Senior MA Specialist, and Paid Digital Marketing Specialists, and collaborating with Analytics, CRM IT, Digital Sales and e-Commerce. It's a team that values data, craftsmanship in execution, and genuine curiosity about what the next generation of marketing tools can do.
   

  

**To be successful, we believe you have**
* 3–5 years of proven experience in marketing automation or CRM, with a track record of independently owning and executing customer journeys end-to-end.
* Familiarity with AI agents and automation workflows – experience using AI to accelerate campaign production and scale testing, whether generating copy variants, automating QA, or running continuous optimisation on live journeys. Curious about what agentic tools can do for a modern MA setup.
* Hands-on experience with Salesforce Marketing Cloud is required. Experience from additional platforms (e.g. Adobe Campaign, Oracle Eloqua, Braze or similar) is a strong advantage, as is a broader multi-platform perspective.
* Basic knowledge of HTML and AMPscript.
* Strong understanding of segmentation, customer journeys and omnichannel personalisation. Experience from working in or alongside a CDP implementation is an advantage – you don’t need to have built it, but you should understand how unified customer profiles and real-time data can power journey logic.
* Experience with A/B testing and campaign performance follow-up.
* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Marketing Automation, or a similar field. Relevant experience can substitute formal education.
* Detail-oriented and structured, with a strong commercial mindset and genuine curiosity about MarTech, data and customer experience.
* Ability to work independently and take ownership, while collaborating effectively across teams.
* Commitment to work from the office 4 days per week.


**Why SAS?**
 At SAS, we offer extensive opportunities for professional development in an international, fast-paced working environment. We are dedicated to the continuous growth of our employees. Working with us comes with a variety of benefits, including:
   

  

* Travel Perks: Enjoy discounted travel opportunities around the world with SAS.
* Health & Wellness: Access to health and wellness benefits, including a newly renovated gym with complimentary classes such as CrossFit and yoga.
* Discounts: Receive discounts from a wide range of brands, as well as on transportation to and from airports, airport shops, hotels, and car rentals.
* Work Environment: Our office location in Frösundavik offers a vibrant workspace with a restaurant, café, and easy access to outdoor activities in Hagaparken and Brunnsviken. Engage in running, tennis, outdoor gym sessions, kayaking, and stand-up paddling with equipment available free of charge.
* Convenient Commute: Benefit from a non-stop bus service connecting our office to Solna station, and commuter trains, alongside a network of cycle paths.


  

  

**Our Culture at SAS**
 At SAS, we are dedicated to caring for each other, delighting our travelers, and driving the transformation towards sustainable aviation. As a future colleague on our team, you’ll join a culture where we work collaboratively towards common goals, recognize each other's contributions, and celebrate successes. Our focus is on safe, sustainable, and punctual execution, and we are committed to protecting our planet while transforming SAS for the future. This is an empowering workplace where you can thrive, grow, and take ownership of your work. Join us at SAS and be part of shaping the future of aviation!
   

  

  

  

**Additional Information**
* Deadline for application: 7/8/26. Please send us your CV as soon as possible, as interviews are conducted continuously, and the position may be filled before the application deadline. Note that we are not able to handle any applications that are sent by email, due to GDPR regulations.
* Desired start date: asap
* Position: Fulltime (100%) starting with a 6-month probation period
* This position is based in Frösundavik, Solna (Stockholm), and you will be expected to work onsite.
* A background check will be conducted at the final stage of this recruitment process, as this role is security classified. If you are aware of any specific matters that may come up during this background check, we kindly ask you to be transparent about them during the recruitment process.


 Come and fly with us!

title: Uppdragledare med inriktning insatsutveckling
description:
**Vill du vara med och skapa bättre förutsättningar för människor att ta steget in på arbetsmarknaden? Hos oss får du en varierad och viktig roll där du både leder, samordnar och driver utveckling som gör verklig skillnad. Tillsammans får vi Sverige i arbete. Vill du bli en av oss?**




****Enhetens uppdrag****




 Enheten Insatsutveckling ansvarar för att säkerställa ett effektivt nyttjande av arbetsmarknadsinsatser genom att bistå med expertkunskap inom området samt ansvara för arbetssätt, process och metod gällande insatsutveckling och -uppföljning. Enheten har också ett ansvarar för leverantörsarbete i samarbete med andra delar av organisationen. På enheten arbetar vi tvärfunktionellt med bland annat IT-avdelningen för utvecklingen av det digitala stödet.
   

  





****Beskrivning av tjänsten****




 Vi söker dig som kan utveckla och förvalta myndighetens insatser till arbetssökande i olika regier, samt att driva uppdrag genom bland annat uppdragsledning och utredning.
   

  





 Arbetet innebär att du driver och samordnar uppdrag med fokus på slutleverans av hög kvalitet. I uppdraget ingår att arbeta tvärfunktionellt och i nära samarbete med andra delar av organisationen. För att utveckla och förvalta de upphandlade arbetsmarknadsinsatserna behöver man väga olika perspektiv mot varandra och ha god förståelse för myndighetens förutsättningar. I uppdraget ingår även att sammanställa och presentera slutsatser och förslag på ett strukturerat sätt inför beredningar och beslut.
   

  





 Enheten Insatsutveckling ansvarar för effektivt nyttjande av upphandlade arbetsmarknadsinsatser och arbetar utifrån enhetens behov och uppdrag.
   

  





 Arbetet kräver att du har ett strategiskt perspektiv och god förståelse för vilken typ av frågor som behöver hanteras på strategisk, taktisk och operativ nivå.
   

  





 Vi söker dig som är resultat- och målfokuserad, kan arbeta självständigt samt har lätt för att skapa goda samarbeten. Du har god analytisk och pedagogisk förmåga och kan kommunicera komplexa frågor och processer.
   

  





****Vårt erbjudande****




**Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid som inleds med sex månaders provanställning, samt en visstidsanställning på 12 månader. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Placeringsorten är Malmö, Göteborg, Östersund eller Solna.**




 Vi erbjuder dig möjligheten att arbeta på en arbetsplats där vi värdesätter balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Du får tillgång till ett generöst semesteravtal, flexibla arbetstider samt möjlighet att arbeta på distans upp till 49 procent på årsbasis. Hos oss ingår även friskvård under arbetstid och ett förmånligt friskvårdsbidrag.
   

  





 Som anställd på Arbetsförmedlingen har du också tillgång till kompetensutveckling och karriärmöjligheter inom myndigheten. Genom vårt arbete bidrar vi till ett inkluderande och hållbart samhälle, där du får möjlighet att göra en verklig skillnad för individer och för samhället i stort. Mer om att jobba hos oss 
   

  





****Grundläggande krav för tjänsten****



* Högskoleexamen om lägst 180hp/120p med samhällsvetenskaplig inriktning
* Minst 2 års aktuell erfarenhet av uppdragsledning på strategisk och/eller nationell nivå
* Minst 2 års aktuell erfarenhet av kravställning
* Erfarenhet av utredningsarbete på strategisk och/eller nationell nivå
* Erfarenhet av kvalitets- och verksamhetsutveckling
* Goda kunskaper i svenska språket, både gällande tal och skrift



****Övriga meriter för tjänsten****



* Erfarenhet av arbete med utformning, förvaltning och uppföljning av insatser som genomförs i extern regi
* Erfarenhet av processinriktat arbete på strategisk och/eller nationell nivå
* Erfarenhet av att analysera, strukturera och dra slutsatser utifrån komplex information samt att tolka och utforma underlag



 Den statliga värdegrunden guidar oss i vårt dagliga arbete. Som anställd hos oss förväntas du arbeta rättvist, opartiskt och med hög integritet, samt bidra till att upprätthålla och stärka förtroendet för vår myndighet.  
   

  





 Utöver detta har du personlig förmåga och fallenhet att arbeta i enlighet med Arbetsförmedlingens medarbetarkriterier. Läs mer om den statliga värdegrunden och våra medarbetarkriterier på vår hemsida.
   

  





 Som medarbetare på Arbetsförmedlingen förväntas du vara:
   

  





**Ansvarstagande** 
 – ta ansvar för ditt arbete, samarbeta och bidra till en god arbetsmiljö.
   

  





**Handlingskraftig** 
 – ta initiativ, bidra till förbättringar och hantera förändringar.
   

  





**Resultatfokuserad** 
 – planera, följa upp och bidra till verksamhetsnytta och resultat.
   

  





****Ansökan****




 Låter det här som en tjänst för dig? Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-08-13.
   

  





 Bifoga ditt CV där du specificerar årtal, månad och arbetsuppgifter för varje anställning, samt intyg som styrker kraven om utbildning och/eller arbetslivserfarenhet i din ansökan. 
   

  





 Det är viktigt att du besvarar urvalsfrågorna detaljerat och sanningsenligt, för att vi ska få en tydlig bild av din erfarenhet. Om efterfrågad information inte framgår riskerar du bli bortsållad i urvalet. Du behöver inte skicka in ett personligt brev.
   

  





 Under rekryteringsprocessen kan urvalstester förekomma. Vi kommer att hålla dig informerad genom hela rekryteringsprocessen. Mer om vår rekryteringsprocess. 
   

  





 Har du skyddade personuppgifter kontaktar du den rekryteringspartner som finns namngiven i annonsen så får du hjälp med att skicka in din ansökan.
   

  





 Vi arbetar aktivt för att vara en myndighet fri från diskriminering. Det är viktigt för oss att all kompetens tas tillvara och vi välkomnar alla sökande. Vi ser positivt på om du har kunskaper i något av våra nationella minoritetsspråk.
   

  





 Välkommen till oss – vi jobbar för ett Sverige i arbete! Här arbetar du på regeringens uppdrag för en väl fungerande arbetsmarknad. Målet är att korta tiden i arbetslöshet genom att matcha arbetssökande med arbetsgivare. Våra insatser riktas i första hand till dem som står längst ifrån arbetsmarknaden och till de arbetsgivare som är öppna för att anställa dem med störst behov av stöd. Vi motverkar felaktiga utbetalningar och brott mot välfärdssystemen så att våra skattemedel används effektivt till det de är till för. Vi samarbetar med många andra aktörer och tillsammans hittar vi lösningar som gör skillnad - för ett Sverige i arbete.
   

  





 Mer om vår organisation och vårt uppdrag

title: Product Marketing Manager – GTM specialist
description:
At ABAX, Product Marketing isn't just a function – it's a strategic imperative and a direct driver of our growth. We are making a significant investment in Product Marketing capacity because we recognize its pivotal function as the driving force behind getting our innovative products to market and ensuring their sustained success.
   

  

**You will be joining a team that acts as**
* A true enabler of sales and an accelerator of adoption.
* The voice of the customer, masterminding compelling messaging rooted in pain point resolution.
* A bridge-builder, fostering crucial collaboration between Product, Tech, Commercial, and Marketing teams.
* A catalyst in tech sales, ensuring our products cut through the digital noise and establish an authentic signal in the market.


*This is a unique opportunity to take our existing Go-To-Market GTM processes and make them your own. To help support our growth into Asset Tracking, new domains and AI, you will play a critical role in commercialising new product updates and domains to ensure that ABAX stands out with an authentic and expert-led voice.*
**What You’ll Work On**
 As our Product Marketing Manager, you will be at the forefront of our product lifecycle, ensuring our innovations reach and resonate with our target markets. Your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Strategic GTM Leadership: Lead and execute comprehensive Go-to-Market (GTM) strategies for new products, features, and solution offerings, ensuring successful launches and market penetration together with the marketing team.
* Masterful Messaging & Positioning: Develop market-leading positioning and differentiated messaging that translates complex technical features into clear, compelling, and customer-centric value propositions across our product portfolio.
* Sales & Commercial Enablement: Create powerful sales enablement tools, impactful marketing content, and compelling collateral that equip our field sales and commercial teams for maximum effectiveness.
* Customer & Market Advocacy: Act as the voice of the market within ABAX, conducting in-depth primary and secondary research on customer insights, market trends, and competitor activities (including telematics, fleet management, and cloud providers) to inform product strategy and identify new opportunities. You'll understand and leverage competitor weaknesses.
* Cross-functional Collaboration: Facilitate effective communication, alignment, and evangelism across Product, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Leadership teams, bridging critical gaps to ensure shared understanding and success.
* Thought Leadership & Evangelism: Contribute to and execute expert-led thought leadership initiatives, evangelizing ABAX products to analysts, prospects, and customers through meetings, webinars, conferences, and trade shows.
* Performance Insight: Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to track product adoption and usage growth, evaluating the impact of PMM efforts on market performance and identifying areas for optimization.


**What We're Looking For**
* 5+ years of progressive Product Marketing experience, with at least 2 years focused on G2M for SaaS / B2B / telematics or Fleet Management / Asset Tracking market, and direct collaboration with field sales & marketing teams.
* Proven experience in a B2B SaaS or tech environment; exposure to telematics, IoT, or asset tracking industries is a significant advantage.
* A strategic, analytical thinker with a pragmatic mindset and a strong customer-centric approach.
* Demonstrated ability to manage multiple complex projects in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
* Exceptional communication (written and verbal) and presentation skills, with the ability to articulate complex concepts clearly and persuasively to diverse audiences.
* A natural collaborator who thrives in cross-functional team settings and can build strong relationships.
* You are well-organized, detail-oriented, and excellent at prioritizing tasks.
* You are a dedicated team player who values open, continuous feedback on performance.
* You are someone who expects to be challenged and is always looking for ways to work smarter.


**Practical Details**
**Start Date:** 
 After summer
   

  

**Work Extent** 
 : Full-time
   

  

**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

*We believe great collaboration happens in person. As an office-first company, we expect our employees to spend the majority of their working week in the office, where we learn from each other, solve problems together, and build strong relationships as a team.*
**Background Check and Reference Verification**
 Successful employment is contingent upon ABAX receiving satisfactory references.
   

  

 As part of our hiring process, we perform a digital reference check through RefApp, an advanced online solution for managing this procedure.
   

  

 Please be aware that a background check may be conducted simultaneously with the reference check.
   

  

**Equal Opportunities**
 At ABAX, we are dedicated to creating an inclusive environment for all our colleagues. This commitment extends to ensuring that our recruitment practices and processes are as inclusive as possible. We encourage applicants from all backgrounds to join us in strengthening our focus on equality and diversity in the workplace.
   

  

**About ABAX**
 ABAX is a leading European telematics IoT platform offering connected mobility solutions for vehicle tracking, tool tracking, and equipment control. Our mission is to deliver mobility data insights that empower people to do more with less.
   

  

 With over 500,000 tracked assets and 40,000 customers, ABAX delivers reliable and powerful solutions for businesses relying on physical operations. Our advanced platform transforms customer needs into actionable insights and automated reporting, driving efficiency and operational excellence.
   

  

 We operate across Europe, with over 350 employees working from our facilities in Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, the Netherlands, Belgium, Poland, and the UK. Our Head Office is in Larvik, Norway.
   

  

 ABAX delivers business value through data-driven insights and strives to find new ways for the customer to utilize data to benefit their businesses, society and the environment.
   

  

 The ABAX SaaS is the basis for future sustainable solutions and business opportunities that will benefit customers across many different industries, society, and the environment.
   

  

 Our mission is to enable business value from connected mobility data.

title: SAP Concur Project Manager
description:
Oversee cloning of the Concur setup for rapid deployment, implementing minimal redesign to ensure speed and consistency.Lead decoupling from systems and configure Concur to align with Robotics organizational structure and expense policies.Manage integration with external systems (e.g., S4 Hana, financial tools) to ensure seamless data flow for expense reporting and reconciliation.
