title: Product AI Ops Lead
description:
**About Us**
**nShift** 
 is the leading global provider of cloud delivery management solutions (SaaS), we enable the frictionless shipment and return of almost one billion shipments across 190 countries each year. We are headquartered in London and Oslo and have over 500 employees across offices in Sweden, Finland, Norway, Denmark, the United Kingdom, Poland, the Netherlands, Belgium, and Romania.
   

  

 Our software is used by many of the world leading e-commerce, retail, manufacturing, and 3PL shippers due to us having over 1000 carriers integrated into our platform, nearly 3 times more than our competitors!
   

  

 If you buy goods online, there is a strong chance that nShift has powered that delivery, so come and join us as we shape the future of shipping, one frictionless journey at a time.
   

  

**Purpose of role**
 This role has two mandates. The first is company-wide: manage the central agentic platform that nShift runs on, including the tooling, integrations, governance model, and enablement layer that makes agent-driven work possible across every function. The second, and your immediate proving ground, is to transform how the product functions, using that same platform to make every core process from discovery to delivery faster and increasingly agent-driven.
   

  

 As platform manager, you define what good looks like for agentic workflows at nShift, build the shared infrastructure other functions adopt, and partner with champions across the business to drive the model outward. What you build is not a product team tool; it is company infrastructure.
   

  

 Product ops is where you prove the model.
   

  

 You run the processes the product function depends on: prioritization, specification, coordination, and launch, and you own a concrete roadmap for making each one agent-driven. The PRD template you standardize this month is the artifact you make machine-executable next quarter. The planning ceremony you streamline now is the one you make obsolete.
   

  

 You report to the CPO and work closely with the VPs of Product, the PM team, and engineering leadership, as well as with dedicated champions across the business as the platform scales.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
**Own the product operating system and make it agentic**
 For each process: operate it, improve it, design its agent-driven successor
   

  

* Prioritization and planning. Own roadmap planning cycles and portfolio prioritization. Cut anything that feels like process without making work better. Build toward agent-ready planning artifacts that reduce ceremony without reducing clarity
* Product specification. Set the standards for PRDs, user stories, and acceptance criteria. Build templates PMs actually use, then evolve them into structured artifacts an agent can decompose and act on
* Product launch. Own the end-to-end launch process: readiness, release notes, GTM coordination, and the post-launch feedback loop. Build toward automated summaries, checklist monitoring, and stakeholder updates that go out without a PM chasing them
* Organization-wide coordination. Own the infrastructure, keeping cross-functional work moving: portfolio reviews, dependency tracking, and the communication cadence across sales, CS, and engineering. Build toward a status propagating automatically, and humans govern decisions rather than tracking updates


**Drive the agentic transition across nShift**
* Build and maintain the shared agentic platform, including best practices, integrations to business systems, and enablement of champions across the organization
* Design the governance model: which decisions need human review, which need oversight by exception, which can be fully delegated. Make the tiers visible and auditable
* Set quality thresholds for agent output and automate the check where possible using dedicated agents and evals


**About You**
* You’re structured by default. You write things down, build systems, and have clear opinions about which processes make teams faster and which only create the feeling of progress. You will retire a process that isn’t working
* You approach each problem with an AI-first mindset. You have a clear view of how agents can replace manual processes, you have tested this at scale before, and you know what works well
* You want to be the person who makes AI-driven change practical, not the person who talks about it
* You’re comfortable without a playbook and honest enough to say early when something isn’t working


**What You'll Bring**
**Must-have**
* At least two years in product management or product operations, with enough proximity to good PMs that you’ve absorbed the craft
* An AI-native working style. Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or equivalent are your default tools. You know how to prompt for structured output, build context documents, and design workflows where AI handles production and you handle judgment
* Hands-on experience building and deploying AI agents professionally, successfully replacing manual processes
* Strong written communication. Precise without being verbose
* Structured thinking under ambiguity: you impose useful structure on messy problems without waiting for someone to scope them first


**Nice to have**
* Hands-on experience with product tooling: Jira, Linear, Confluence, Notion, Aha!, or similar. Enough to build useful infrastructure, not just use it
* Background in change management or org design: this role rewires how the product function works today, with a mandate that grows with the model
* Nordic or European professional context
* Kindly ensure that your CV is submitted in English


 At nShift we believe in embracing diversity in all forms and fostering an inclusive environment for everyone which we believe is essential for our continued success. We're an equal-opportunity employer which means that all applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, family or parental status, national origin, veteran, neurodiversity, or disability status.

title: Group Manager Quality
description:
We are looking for a highly capable and pragmatic Quality Manager to play a key role in shaping the next phase of quality excellence at RaySearch Laboratories, supporting innovation in a medical device organization.
   

  

**About The Job**
 This role is ideal for someone who combines deep quality and regulatory expertise with operational pragmatism - a leader who understands how to build lean, scalable, and fit-for-purpose quality systems that support both compliance and business growth.
   

  

 You will have the opportunity to influence how quality operates across the organization, drive evolution of an established QMS, and implement efficient ways of working that enable the business to operate with both confidence and speed.
   

  

 You will be part of the Quality & Regulatory Affairs Department, reporting to the Director of the Department, and lead a team of three direct reports.
   

  

 Your main tasks
   

  

* Drive the continued evolution of the Quality Management System (QMS), with a focus on simplicity, scalability, and business enablement
* Strengthen and streamline quality processes to support efficient, high-quality operations as the organization grows
* Lead and develop the quality team, providing clear direction, coaching, and support
* Oversee key operational quality activities, including CAPA, nonconformance management, change control, internal audits, document management, and supplier quality
* Partner with cross-functional teams to ensure quality practices enable efficient and effective ways of working
* Support validation and compliance activities related to software systems and eQMS platforms, including contributing to the selection and implementation of a future eQMS solution
* Contribute to the development of quality and compliance processes in emerging areas such as AI, machine learning, and data management
* Ensure compliance with relevant regulatory frameworks, including ISO 13485, MDR Article 10, MDSAP, and QMSR
* Apply pragmatic, risk-based thinking to quality and compliance challenges, balancing regulatory requirements with business needs


 Your profile
   

  

 You are a pragmatic, collaborative leader with a strong focus on continuous improvement. You understand what good quality looks like and how to implement it in a way that supports, rather than slows down, the business.
   

  

 You are comfortable operating in evolving environments, able to distinguish between critical risks and unnecessary complexity, and motivated by building strong cross-functional relationships.
   

  

 Most importantly, you are motivated by the opportunity to make a visible impact and help shape a modern, scalable quality organization.
   

  

**Experience & Skills**
* MSc or BSc in engineering, life sciences, or a related field relevant to medical device quality and regulatory affairs
* Extensive experience in Quality Management within the medical device industry
* Strong expertise in ISO 13485 and quality management systems for medical devices
* Lead auditor experience, including planning, conducting, and leading internal and external audits
* Proven leadership experience, including leading and developing teams
* A hands-on and pragmatic leader who enjoys improving processes and solving operational challenges
* Very good command of English, both written and spoken


**The Following Are Considered Strong Merits**
* Expertise in MDR, MDSAP, and FDA QMSR requirements
* Strong understanding and practical application of ISO 14971 risk management principles
* Experience implementing, optimizing, or validating eQMS solutions
* Experience with medical device design and development processes, including software lifecycle processes under IEC 62304
* Lead Auditor certification


 Our Culture
   

  

 At RaySearch, we share a passion for innovation and the fight against cancer. Our team consists of dedicated experts who strive to deliver exceptional results through collaboration, attention to detail, and cutting-edge technology. We take pride in our role as a leader in cancer treatment, developing solutions that truly make a difference for patients worldwide.
   

  

 Our Offer
   

  

 We offer a dynamic and inclusive work environment in Hagastaden, Stockholm’s Life Science Hub. Our modern office space includes an in-house gym, yoga classes, and social activities such as ping pong, table football, and after-work events. We also provide a fantastic lunch buffet, daily fika, and a stunning rooftop terrace with a 360-degree view of Stockholm. This comes with a competitive compensation and benefits package.
   

  

 Application
   

  

 Please apply for the position through the application form below. We do not accept applications via e-mail.

title: Senior Enterprise Account Executive - Retail
description:
**Company Description**
 It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.
   

  

**Job Description**
 You will produce new business sales revenue from a SaaS license model. You will accomplish this through account planning, territory planning, researching prospect customers, using business development strategies and completing field-based sales activities within a defined set of prospects, territory or vertical.
   

  

**What You Get To Do In This Role**
* Develop relationships with multiple C-suite personas (e.g., CFO, CIO, COO, CDO) across all product sales
* Oversee client relationship mapping to the account team, orchestrating an account strategy while leading across a broad virtual team (Solutions Consultants, Solutions Specialist, Success resources, Partners and Marketing, etc.)
* Be a trusted advisor to your customers by understanding their business and advising on how ServiceNow can help help their IT roadmap
* Identify the right specialist/ support resources to bring into a deal, at the right time


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* 10+ years of sales experience within software OR solutions sales organization
* Experience establishing trusted relationships with current and prospective clients and other teams
* Experience producing new business, negotiate deals, and maintain healthy C-Level relationships
* Experience achieving sales targets
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision-making, or problem-solving. This may include using AI-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* The ability to understand the "bigger picture" and our plans around IT
* Experience promoting a customer success focus in a "win as a team" environment
* Willingness to travel up to 50%


 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.
   

  

 From Fortune. ©2025 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

title: D365 Application Specialist
description:
**APPLICATION SPECIALIST D365**
**Would you like to work in an international environment where you’ll make a difference every day? At Permobil, we’re looking for game-changers to join us as we innovate for individuals and develop the world’s most advanced assistive solutions.**
 At
 **Permobil** 
 , the people who use our products come first. Our purpose is to create advanced assistive solutions that make the lives of adults and children living with disabilities more enriching. Our people are passionate about pushing the boundaries of technology to deliver innovations that improve lives. We are a sustainable and responsible business committed to continuous improvement, and our customers can trust us to provide market-leading solutions driven by insights-based clinical data.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 We are looking for an
 **Applications Specialist** 
**with strong expertise in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations** 
 to join our global IT team. Depending on your background and experience, this role could be filled at a specialist or senior specialist level. You will be a key contributor to Permobil's ongoing D365 ERP rollout program – bridging functional finance processes with technical system capabilities, supporting our live environments, and helping shape how we scale the platform across regions.
   

  

 The ideal candidate understands finance from the inside, having worked in or closely with accounting teams before stepping into a systems-focused role over the past few years. You are comfortable sitting between the business and the platform, translating what finance teams actually need into D365 solutions that work.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Act as a subject matter expert for D365 F&O Finance modules (GL, AR, AP, FA, budgeting, cash & bank management)
* Support and maintain live D365 environments – managing incidents, change requests, and root cause analysis
* Contribute to ERP rollout programs: fit-gap workshops, configuration, testing, cutover, and hypercare
* Collaborate with finance business stakeholders to translate requirements into system solutions
* Support data migration and integration activities related to finance processes
* Create and maintain functional documentation, process guides, and training materials
* Serve as a bridge between the business and technical/developer teams
* Provide mentorship and knowledge transfer within the IT team on D365 Finance topics


**Qualifications & Skills**
* A solid foundation in accounting – you understand financial statements, period-end close, reconciliations, and core finance processes from having worked in or alongside an accounting function,
* A career path that started in finance/accounting and has shifted toward the system side over the past 3–5 years,
* 3–7 years of hands-on experience with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations (F&O),
* Deep functional knowledge of core Finance modules — GL, AR, AP, Fixed Assets, and budgeting,
* Experience supporting or participating in full-cycle D365 implementations,
* Ability to configure D365 and write clear functional specifications,
* Comfortable working across time zones in a global, distributed team,
* Fluent in English (written and spoken),
* Prior experience with Microsoft Dynamics AX 2012 – especially in a finance context,
* Knowledge of Azure DevOps for issue tracking and release management.


**Meriting Skills**
* Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance certification (MB-310 or equivalent),
* Experience with multi-country rollouts or global ERP programs,
* Familiarity with finance-adjacent integrations (e.g. invoice automation tools such as Basware, output management solutions such as Lasernet, or EDI/punchout scenarios),
* Swedish language skills (for Sweden-based candidates)


**Why is Permobil the next step for you?**
* You’ll make a difference. Every day. Everything we do leads to understanding and improving the lives of our users. By making our operations smarter and more efficient, you directly contribute to getting the right product to the right person at the right time.
* You’ll make your mark as part of our future. We collaborate with colleagues across borders to Innovate for Individuals. In this role, you will be at the forefront of bringing AI into Operations and Supply Chain, and the impact you make personally could lead change around the world.
* You’ll feel welcome from day one. We’re known for being great colleagues, who are collaborative, fun and at the cutting-edge. Everyone at Permobil cares as much as you do about making a positive difference – both for our users and for the colleagues you’ll support with AI.


**Application Process**
 We will conduct selection continuously so send us your application
 **today or before July 31st** 
 at the latest!
   

  

 Permobil is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity and inclusion. We welcome applications from all qualified individuals.
   

  

 For more information about the position, please contact Erik Eliasson, Vice President IT Sales & Customer Experience, erik.eliasson@permobil.com
   

  

 For information about the recruitment process, please contact Zivile Mitkute, Talent Acquisition Partner, zivile.mitkute@permobil.com
   

  

**Please respect that we do not wish recruitment assistance or advertising, we decline calls from recruitment and advertising providers.**
**More About Permobil**
 Permobil founder Dr. Per Uddén believed that helping people achieve the greatest level of independence is a basic human right and, for over 50 years, Permobil has held fast to that belief. Permobil is a global leader in advanced rehabilitation technology, passionate about better understanding our users’ needs and improving their quality of life through state-of-the-art healthcare solutions. Today, those solutions include power wheelchairs, seating and positioning products, power assist, and manual wheelchairs.
   

  

 Permobil is part of Patricia Industries, a subsidiary of Investor AB, and is headquartered in Sweden. Permobil has 2 000 team members in 18 countries around the world. For more information regarding the company’s storied history and complete product line, visit permobil.com.

title: Senior Embedded CI/CD Engineer – Power Electronics & Electric Vehicles
description:
About the Role
  
We are looking for a Senior Embedded CI/CD Engineer with a strong background in software integration, continuous deployment, and embedded systems development.
  
You will join a highly skilled engineering team working with software solutions for electrified vehicles. The role focuses on developing and improving CI/CD processes, integrating embedded software components, and enabling efficient software deliveries for complex automotive systems.
  
This is an opportunity for an engineer who enjoys working at the intersection between software development, automation, integration, and future vehicle technologies.
  
  

Responsibilities
  
As a Senior Embedded CI/CD Engineer, you will be responsible for:
  
Developing and improving software release and continuous deployment processes.
  
Integrating embedded software components at application and BSW (Basic Software) level.
  
Supporting and improving CI/CD pipelines and automation frameworks.
  
Maintaining and developing CI toolchains.
  
Taking ownership of software releases and ensuring high-quality deliveries.
  
Supporting automated integration testing and continuous verification.
  
Working with variant management and configuration handling for different product solutions.
  
Collaborating with software developers, system engineers, and other stakeholders to improve development processes.
  
  

Your Background
  
We are looking for someone who has a strong passion for embedded software development and complex automotive systems.
  
You have experience working with software integration and automation and enjoy taking technical challenges from concept through implementation and production readiness.
  
You are a proactive and structured engineer who takes ownership, communicates effectively, and enjoys working in a collaborative environment.
  
  

Required Qualifications
  
  

**Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in:**  

Electrical Engineering
  
Electronics
  
Control Systems
  
Signals & Systems
  
Computer Science
  
Data Engineering
  
Mechatronics
  
Or equivalent field
  
Minimum 4 years of relevant professional experience.
  
  

**Experience working with:**  

CI/CD or DevOps environments
  
Embedded software integration
  
Automated integration testing
  
Software build and release processes
  
  

**Programming experience in one or more of:**  

Python
  
C
  
C++
  
MATLAB/Simulink
  
Strong understanding of AUTOSAR and related toolchains.
  
Experience working with calibration tools and scripting for automated testing.
  
Ability to work with complex software systems and troubleshoot integration issues.
  
Fluent English communication skills.
  
  

Meritorious Skills
  
  

**Experience with:**  

Automotive powertrain or electrification systems.
  
Git-based development workflows.
  
Jenkins.
  
Makefiles.
  
Build environments.
  
Software configuration management.
  
Continuous Integration frameworks.
  
European driving license (B).
  
  

Personal Profile
  
  

**We are looking for someone who is:**  

Passionate about embedded software and vehicle electrification.
  
A natural problem solver who enjoys technical challenges.
  
Quality-focused with strong attention to detail.
  
Comfortable taking ownership and driving improvements.
  
A collaborative team player who contributes to a positive engineering culture.
  
Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  
  

Language Requirements
  
Professional English communication skills are required.
  
Swedish language skills are considered a strong advantage but are not mandatory.
  
  

**Location:** Gothenburg, Sweden
  
**Start date:** According to agreement

title: AFRY Digital Services söker nästa kollega inom Data Engineering
description:
**Företagsbeskrivning**  

AFRY är ett internationellt teknikkonsultbolag med stark lokal närvaro. Hos oss får du arbeta tillsammans med erfarna kollegor i en miljö där teknik, kvalitet och hållbarhet står i fokus. Vi är en stabil arbetsgivare med kollektivavtal, goda förmåner och en kultur där vi värnar om kompetensutveckling, samarbete och work‑life balance.

 **Jobbeskrivning**  

Är du en erfaren Data Engineer som trivs med att bygga stabila, skalbara och långsiktigt hållbara datalösningar i produktion? Hos AFRY Digital Services söker vi nu seniora Data Engineers till vårt team i Göteborg som vill arbeta i tekniskt utmanande uppdrag där data engineering är affärskritiskt. (Detta är inte en BI roll, utan en roll för dig som vill arbeta nära kod, arkitektur, drift och kvalitet i moderna dataplattformar)

 **Kvalifikationer**  

Som Data Engineer hos oss arbetar du som konsult i uppdrag där du är med och bygger, vidareutvecklar och förvaltar dataplattformar och dataflöden som används för analys, beslutsstöd och vidare digital utveckling.  

Du arbetar nära andra Data Engineers, Data Scientists och mjukvaruutvecklare, och ansvarar för att dataflöden fungerar robust, effektivt och långsiktigt i produktion. Uppdragen varierar i längd och omfattning från större plattformsinitiativ till mer avgränsade tekniska insatser både lokalt och internationellt.


Exempel på arbetsuppgifter

* Designa, utveckla och underhålla datapipelines i Python
* Arbeta med ETL/ELT‑flöden, transformation och datamodellering
* Säkerställa datakvalitet, validering och testbarhet i dataflöden
* Arbeta med workflow orchestration (t.ex. Airflow eller liknande)
* Bygga och drifta lösningar i molnmiljö, främst Microsoft Azure
* Bidra till CI/CD, versionshantering och övervakning av dataflöden
* Samarbeta med kollegor och kunder kring krav, arkitektur och lösningsdesign


Vi söker dig som har

* Minst 3 års erfarenhet som Data Engineer i produktionsmiljö
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Python
* God erfarenhet av SQL, databaser och datamodellering
* Erfarenhet av att bygga och underhålla skalbara och robusta datapipelines
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserade dataplattformar, gärna Microsoft Azure
* Vana att arbeta strukturerat med Git, kodgranskning och test
* Förmåga att ta ansvar för lösningar hela vägen till stabil drift


Meriterande

* Erfarenhet av Airflow, Dagster eller liknande orkestreringsverktyg
* Azure‑tjänster som Data Factory, Databricks eller Synapse
* CI/CD‑lösningar och DevOps‑arbetssätt för dataflöden
* Containerteknik (Docker, Kubernetes)


Du behöver kunna kommunicera professionellt på engelska.  

Svenska är meriterande för den här tjänsten, då flera uppdrag och kunddialoger sker på svenska.

 **Ytterligare information**  

Har du frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta:


Ulrika Stålhammar, Sektionschef  

ulrika.stalhammar@afry.com


Vänligen acceptera att vi inte tar emot ansökningar via e-post.

*På AFRY driver vi förändring i allt vi gör. Vi anser att förändring sker när modiga idéer möts, när vi samarbetar, skapar innovation och omfamnar kreativa lösningar, det är så vi skapar framtiden. Vi söker konstant kvalificerade kandidater som vill ansluta sig till våra inkluderande team runt om i världen. Bli en del av oss och påskynda den gröna omställningen*
company_description: AFRY is a European leader in engineering, design, and advisory services, with a global reach. We are 16,000 devoted experts in infrastructure, industry, energy and digitalisation.

title: Software Development - Senior Principal Engineer
description:
*Omega 365 Consulting is a leading supplier of highly skilled project personnel in the oil and gas, renewable energy, and infrastructure sectors. We offer a wide range of consultant assignments, featuring many of the most exciting projects in Norway and internationally.*

 **Details**


Duration: 17.08.2026-16.02.2027  

Location: Västerås  

Option:

 **Assignment Description**


We're looking for a DevOps Engineer to help pave the way for our digital platforms.  

Our R&D engineers and scientists develop breakthrough technologies that change the way the world works and how industries do business. We constantly push the limits of convention, while keeping our focus on delivering quality products and solutions to our customers.  

You'll join an agile team in a truly global environment, working with colleagues in Poland who collaborate closely with teams in India and Sweden. You'll report to the local department as well as the Global R&D functions for digital solutions in HVDC.  

Our teams work in an agile way where everyone is expected to contribute their knowledge and experience toward common goals. That means breaking down activities together, collaborating within the team, and reaching out to other teams in (and sometimes outside) the HVDC organization.  

  

**What you'll be doing:**

* Maintaining and creating automated software builds (including internal tools) and testing for cloud and edge solutions.
* Managing and enhancing logging and monitoring systems.
* Identifying and deploying cybersecurity measures through continuous vulnerability assessment and risk management.
* Creating new environments using Kubernetes and Helm.
* Configuring and managing application and time series databases.
* Working in a cross-disciplinary team using agile development methodology,sharing your knowledge and experience with other team members.
* Participating in DevOps forums and contributing ideas and innovations.

 **Qualifications**

* Bachelor's degree or higher in Computer Science or a similar field, with 3+ years of experience and fluent English.
* Well documented (10+ years) experience in relevant Engineering field
* On a national level unique competence relevant to the special q qualifications and requirements for the assignment
* Good knowledge of Microsoft Azure and Azure DevOps,CI/CD experience Docker and Kubernetes experience.
* Experience working in Linux-based infrastructure, ArgoCD and Helm ChartsSolid troubleshooting and debugging skills.

 **Nice to have:**

* Understanding of IoT platforms/services and IoT communication (MQTT, Modbus, IEC 61850, CAN, WCF, OPC UA)
* Cybersecurity knowledge related to data transfer over IoT communication protocols.

**Join Omega 365 Consulting for:**

* *Personalized, hands-on support from our dedicated Omega 365 team members*
* *Collaboration with one of Norway's most prestigious consultant firms*
* *Guidance from experienced department managers, facilitating the development of your project expertise*
* *Internal visa assistance and expert advice for EEA/expat consultants*
* *Excellent opportunities to expand your professional network through project involvement and social gatherings*
* *Exclusive benefits including access to holiday houses and cabins in picturesque locations such as Hovden, Hemsedal, Geilo, Hafjell, Oppdal, Voss, Vågsli, Sirdal, Gran Canaria, and Thailand*
* *Diverse offerings of events including concerts and exciting excursion, both in Norway and abroad. We unveil attractive new trips exclusively for our employees every year.*

*Explore further at:* *https://omega365.com/advantage*

title: Senior Kubernetes-konsult
description:
**Om oss**  

Conscia levererar lösningar inom cybersäkerhet och nätverk till kunder med verksamhetskritisk IT-infrastruktur. Våra högt certifierade medarbetare designar, implementerar, supporterar och driver innovativa, skräddarsydda IT-lösningar som hjälper våra kunder i deras dagliga verksamhet och teknologiska utveckling.
   

  

På Conscia arbetar vi i teknikens framkant för att forma morgondagens IT-infrastruktur. För oss är det självklart att ständigt uppmana såväl kunder som medarbetare till ständigt lärande och innovation. Vi vet hur viktigt ett nära samarbete med kollegor, leverantörer och kunder är för att alltid leverera på högsta nivå.
  

  

**Om tjänsten**  

Brinner du för Kubernetes, DevOps och moderna containerplattformar? Vill du arbeta med tekniskt avancerade lösningar hos några av Sveriges största företag och hjälpa kunder att automatisera och framtidssäkra sina IT-miljöer? Då kan det här vara rätt möjlighet för dig.
  

  

Som Kubernetes-konsult på Conscia blir du en del av ett specialistteam som arbetar med att designa, implementera och vidareutveckla moderna containerplattformar och automatiserade infrastrukturlösningar. Du arbetar nära våra kunder i projekt där fokus ligger på Kubernetes/OpenShift, DevOps och automation.
  

Rollen omfattar hela livscykeln – från arkitektur och implementation till automatisering, drift och optimering. Du kommer att hjälpa kunder att effektivisera sina leveransflöden och skapa moderna plattformar med hög skalbarhet, säkerhet och stabilitet.
  

  

**Dina huvudsakliga uppgifter:**  

* Design och implementation av containerplattformar som Kubernetes och OpenShift
* Bygga och vidareutveckla CI/CD-pipelines och DevOps-processer
* Automatisering av infrastruktur, deployment och drift
* Arbeta med Infrastructure as Code och verktyg som Terraform och Ansible
* Hjälpa kunder att modernisera och optimera sina plattformar och arbetssätt
* Delta i värdeskapande projekt med fokus på teknik, effektivitet och affärsnytta

  

**Kvalifikationer och erfarenhet:**  

Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av att arbeta med Kubernetes i större och komplexa miljöer samt ett starkt intresse för automation och moderna plattformslösningar. Du trivs i en konsultativ roll där du får kombinera tekniskt djup med kunddialog och rådgivning.
  

För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:
  

* Gedigen erfarenhet av Kubernetesbaserade plattformar som OpenShift
* Flera års erfarenhet av att bygga, drifta och vidareutveckla containerplattformar
* Erfarenhet av DevOps och CI/CD-verktyg som Jenkins, Git och Docker
* God kunskap inom automatisering och Infrastructure as Code, exempelvis Terraform eller Ansible
* Erfarenhet av virtualiseringsplattformar som t.ex Nutanix eller liknande
* Erfarenhet av Linux, scripting och moderna infrastrukturlösningar
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar som AWS, Azure eller Google Cloud är meriterande

Vi tror också att du är lösningsorienterad, kommunikativ och trivs med att arbeta nära kunder för att skapa långsiktig affärsnytta.
  

  

Vi ser fram emot din ansökan, har du frågor om tjänsten är du hjärtligt välkommen att höra av dig till Helena Ejdersten, Consultant Manager på telefonnummer +46767721318 eller via mail på helena.ejdersten@conscia.com . Som ett kvalitativt led i vår rekryteringsprocess genomför vi bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidaten. Ansökan behöver göras via länken i annonsen nedanför och vi träffar kandidater löpande.

title: Cloud Architect AWS - Migration Delivery
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


**Din roll**  

  

Vill du vara med och forma framtidens molnlösningar?
  

  

Du blir en del av Capgeminis Cloud & Infrastructure Services (CIS)-enhet med fokus på projekt- och konsulttjänster i Norden. Vårt mål är att erbjuda kunder helhetslösningar inom Cloud och vi erbjuder en mängd olika tjänster till våra kunder, från strategisk rådgivning till projektgenomförande.
  

  

*I denna roll kommer du ha en nyckelroll i att:*
  

* Leda vår kund genom mainframe moderniseringsinitiativ
* Driva komplexa migreringsprojekt
* Samarbeta med intressenter för att samla in krav och föreslå effektiva migrationsstrategier
* Agera som en betrodd rådgivare till kunder gällande branschtrender och ny teknik
* Dela kunskap inom organisationen genom mentorskap, utbildning och skapande av återanvändbara artefakter

**Din Profil**
  

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av molnarkitektur och implementering
* Praktisk teknisk erfarenhet av mainframe, non-x86 legacy system och av teknologier som COBOL, JCL, CICS, DB2 för z/OS, Assembler, PL/I, Java, Rexx, flat/sequential files, GDGs och VSAM
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av en teknisk roll med att migrera workloads från mainframe och non-x86 legacy systems till distribuerade x86 infrastrukturer antingen on-prem eller till cloud lösning.
* God erfarenhet av att integrera mainframe och non-x86 legacy system med distribuerade Linux- eller Windows-baserade x86-servrar
* Flytande i Svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift

  

Önskvärda kvalifikationer:
  

* AWS-certifieringar på associate- eller professionell nivå (t.ex. Solutions Architect Associate eller Professional, DevOps Engineer Professional) är meriterande
* Erfarenhet av att leda kunder i initiativ för modernisering av mainframe och legacy system
* Erfarenhet av verktyg och metoder som används för att migrera mainframe workloads via hårdvaru-/mellanvaruemulering, automatiserad kodkonvertering, and re-platforming.
* Erfarenhet av att analysera och implementera lokala on-prem mainframes applikationer och datalager för modernisering av workloads

  

**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas:**
  

* Konkurrenskraftig lön, förmånliga tjänstepensioner och kollektivavtal som ger trygghet
* Fokus på din hälsa och ditt välmående, med initiativ för att skapa balans mellan jobb och fritid
* En arbetsmiljö med kollegor som stöttar och inspirerar varandra, och chefer som har ditt bästa i fokus
* Brett utbud av karriärmöjligheter och tillgång till Capgeminis stora utbildningskatalog, särskilt inom den senaste teknologin för t.ex. cloud och generativ AI
* En företagskultur där mångfald och inkludering värdesätts högt

**Ansökan**
  

*I denna rekrytering hanterar vi ansökningar löpande. Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov. Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Jessica Fogelsjöö, Jessica.fogelsjoo@capgemini.com.*


Till denna roll söker vi medarbetare för säkerhetsklassat uppdrag placerad hos kund.


*#LI-JF1*


Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It is a responsible and diverse group of 340,000 team members in more than 50 countries. With its strong over 55-year heritage, Capgemini is trusted by its clients to unlock the value of technology to address the entire breadth of their business needs. It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Spontansökan Norrköping
description:
**Spontanansökan Norrköping**
-----------------------------


Intresserad av att jobba på Sogeti i Norrköping men hittar ingen passande tjänst bland våra jobbannonser just nu? Skicka in en spontanansökan! Vi gör en initial bedömning och återkoppling och hör sedan av oss när vi har en tjänst som vi tror passar din profil.


Sogeti erbjuder spännande och utvecklande kunduppdrag inom många olika branscher. Vi har uppdrag inom t.ex. systemutveckling, Data/ AI, test, projektledning och mycket annat.Vår arbetsplats präglas av positiv attityd där vi hjälper varandra och har kul på jobbet. Gillar du teknik, är flexibel och intresserad av människor så kommer du att trivas hos oss på Sogeti.


Hos oss får du stora möjligheter att växa både som person och konsult.Vi har massor av spännande uppdrag och möjigheter som väntar, både lokalt och nationellt. Våra konsulter erbjuds en flexibel arbetssituation, vilket innebär en mix av att arbeta på plats hos kund och/eller distans från Sogetikontoret eller hemifrån.


Låter det intressant eller vill du veta mer? Hör av dig så berättar vi mer eller skicka in en ansökan så återkommer vi till dig så snart vi kan!


**Om oss**


Sogeti Sverige, en del av Capgemini-koncernen, med 21 kontor och 1300 medarbetare, skapar affärsvärde med teknologi för organisationer som behöver införa innovation snabbt och som vill ha en lokal partner med global skalbarhet. Med en hands-on-kultur och närhet till kunderna, implementerar Sogeti lösningar som hjälper organisationer att arbeta snabbare, bättre och smartare. Genom att kombinera agilitet och snabb implementation via en DevOps-ansats, levererar Sogeti innovativa lösningar inom test- och kvalitetssäkring, molnet och systemutveckling, förstärkta av AI, data och automation.


Works in the area of Software Engineering, which encompasses the development, maintenance and optimization of software solutions/applications.1. Applies scientific methods to analyse and solve software engineering problems.2. The software engineer builds skills and expertise of his/her software engineering discipline to reach standard software engineer skills expectations for the applicable role, as defined in Professional Communities.5. The software engineer collaborates and acts as team player with other software engineers and stakeholders.
Sogeti Sverige, en del av Capgemini Group, med 19 kontor och 1200 medarbetare, gör teknologi enkelt och värdeskapande. Vi är specialiserade på AI-drivna lösningar inom quality engineering & testing, data och cloud och förvandlar snabbt idéer till handling. Sogeti levererar konkreta resultat, hjälper organisationer att innovera med självförtroende och skapar värde från dag ett. Vi är agila, snabbrörliga och drar nytta av starka partnerskap. Våra lokala team arbetar sida vid sida med våra kunder och bygger nära relationer genom att förstå deras verklighet. Tillsammans med Capgemini-koncernens globala styrka och branschexpertis skapar vi skalbara resultat.
  

***Right here. Right now.***| www.sogeti.se

title: Senior Platform Engineer / DevOps Consultant – GitOps & Kubernetes
description:
July 9, 2026
Full Time, Hybrid
Sweden
Posted 2 days ago
We are hiring **Senior Platform Engineer / DevOps Consultant – GitOps & Kubernetes**for **Sweden.**


**Job Summary:**


We are seeking an experienced **Senior Platform Engineer / DevOps Consultant** to design, build, and maintain a modern GitOps-based delivery platform running on Kubernetes. This is a hands-on consulting role requiring deep technical expertise in cloud-native platforms, GitOps practices, container orchestration, and artifact management.


**Educational Qualification:** Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, or related field, or equivalent professional experience.


**Roles & Responsibilities:**


* **Platform & Artifact Management:** Administer, configure, and optimize JFrog Artifactory as the organization’s governed repository, while managing secure, cloud-native deployments, identity integrations, and cloud networking across AWS and Azure.
* **Kubernetes & DevOps Orchestration:** Deploy, optimize, and troubleshoot production-grade Kubernetes environments (including resource management, networking, and RBAC) while building and enhancing GitOps workflows via ArgoCD and CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.

**Technical Skills & Expertise:**


* 7+ years of experience in **Platform Engineering, DevOps, or Cloud Infrastructure**.
* Hands-on experience configuring, administering, and managing **JFrog Artifactory**.
* Experience with **JFrog Xray** and **Curation** is highly desirable.
* Proven experience deploying, configuring, and managing **ArgoCD** in production environments.
* Strong knowledge of **Git**, Git workflows, and **CI/CD** pipeline implementation, with experience in **GitHub Actions** preferred.
* Experience working with cloud platforms: **Microsoft Azure: AKS, Microsoft Entra ID, Virtual Networks (VNet), Private Endpoints, and Workload Identity**.
* **Amazon Web Services (AWS): Amazon ECR and IAM**.
* Practical experience running ArgoCD and Artifactory in these environments is required.

**Soft Skills:**


* Ability to work independently and take ownership of technical deliverables.
* Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
### **Job Features**


Job Category Information Technology

title: Azure- och AI Specialist
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom Applications team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda, skalbara och säkra cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation. AI är en nyckelteknologi i allt vi gör och en central del i hur vi formar och bygger moderna system och lösningar, där intelligenta AI-drivna arbetssätt och teknologier som Agentic AI driver utvecklingen framåt. Bli en del av oss och var med och forma framtidens system tillsammans med världsledande organisationer och bidra till att frigöra teknikens fulla potential i en mer hållbar och inkluderande värld!  

  

  

  

**Om rollen**
  

Är du en passionerad Azure utvecklare som vill vara i framkant av teknologins innovation? Vi söker dig som vill arbeta med de senaste teknikerna och banbrytande projekt - Bli en del av vårt dynamiska team och forma framtidens lösningar! Vårt Microsoft Cloud Apps Team i Stockholm växer och vi letar efter dig som brinner för arbete inom Azure! Vårt kontor ligger centralt i Stockholm med fantastisk utsikt över kanalen, precis vid Barnhusbron. Microsoft Cloud Apps teamet är ett medelstort team på ca 20 personer utspridda på ett antal olika uppdrag. De flesta kör en kombination av hemarbete, arbete hos kund och arbete på Capgemini kontoret. Ett uppskattat inslag när vi umgås tillsammans i teamet är gemensam fredagsfika, regelbundna teammöten och gemensamma aktiviteter. Vår vision är att vara ett team som arbetar brett med kompetens att leverera end to end-lösningar till våra kunder.  

  

  



*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*


* Vara en del av ett högpresterande och agilt team som arbetar med affärskritiska lösningar och teamleveranser för stora kunder – med fokus på de senaste teknologierna från Microsoft och andra ledande partners.
* Utveckla framtidssäkrad kompetens genom att arbeta med moderna tekniker som testdriven utveckling, AI och clean code – och undvik att fastna i föråldrade lösningar.
* Ta ansvar genom hela utvecklingsprocessen, från kravanalys och design till utveckling, test och leverans – och bidra till att digitalt transformera kunders verksamheter.

Få kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling genom certifieringar, spännande uppdrag och stöd i din karriärresa mot att bli en multi-domän specialist inom Microsoft Azure Cloud.  
* 

**Din profil**


* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av Microsoft Azure där Azure är din huvudsakliga leveransplattform
* Stark utvecklarbakgrund inom Microsoft .NET och Azure Native Development
* Erfarenhet av containerbaserad arkitektur i Azure, t.ex. AKS och microservices
* God vana av DevOps/MLOps i Azure (CI/CD, IaC, övervakning, drift i produktionsmiljö)
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att leverera AI‑lösningar på Azure (inte bara POC:er)
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Azure OpenAI (LLM‑lösningar, copilots, RAG, embeddings m.m.)
* Erfarenhet av Agentic AI‑lösningar, arbetat med Azure AI Foundry eller motsvarande för att bygga, styra och förvalta agent‑baserade AI‑lösningar
* Förmåga att designa skalbara, säkra och kostnadseffektiva AI‑lösningar enligt Azure best practices
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska
  
  

**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**

* Arbeta med de senaste teknologierna och påverka på nordisk nivå. Du samarbetar med andra specialister, kompetensväxlar och bidrar till att bygga AWS-kapabilitet i Norden – samtidigt som du påverkar några av världens största bolag.
* Utvecklas genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna initiativ- Du får tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar inom AI, AWS och Microsoft Azure, samt möjlighet att engagera dig i Capgeminis fokusområden som Diversity & Inclusion, Sustainability, Wellness Club och Art Club.

Njut av en engagerande arbetsplats med starkt stöd och förmåner. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension, bonusprogram, företagshälsovård och sjukvårdsförsäkring – samt en inkluderande kontorskultur med sociala aktiviteter och teambuilding.  
* 

**Ansökan**  

  

Redo att ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Ansök nu och bli en del av Capgemini Sveriges innovativa Azure Team! Under rekryteringsprocessen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare.
  

  

Under sommaren kan vår återkoppling ta lite längre tid än vanligt, men vi ser fram emot din ansökan och hör av oss så snart vi kan, senast i augusti. Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan!

  

  

*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*


#LI-RR1
  

**Om Capgemini**  



Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. title: Business Analyst - Pharma
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Your Role**
  

As a Business Analyst within our Compliance, Quality, and Regulatory team, you will work at the intersection of business, IT, and regulatory frameworks—supporting leading pharmaceutical and Life Sciences companies. You are employed by Capgemini Engineering and work as a consultant in high-impact initiatives across the clinical domain. In this role, you will take ownership of business analysis activities and contribute to shaping digital solutions that support clinical development, regulatory compliance, and patient-centric outcomes. Depending on assignment, you may also take on responsibilities typical of an IT Project Manager, contributing to delivery leadership and coordination in complex, regulated environments.
  

  

*In this role you will play a key role in:*
  

* Acting as a key Business Analyst in cross-functional project teams, collaborating closely with client stakeholders, subject matter experts, and fellow consultants
* Leading requirements elicitation, analysis, and documentation for complex initiatives within pharma and clinical environments
* Translate business needs and regulatory requirements into clear, actionable functional and non-functional requirements
* Advising clients on best practices within clinical IT, quality, and regulatory compliance
* Ensuring alignment between business objectives, regulatory frameworks, and project outcomes
* In some assignments, contribute to or support delivery leadership by coordinating activities, managing dependencies, and supporting structured delivery in regulated IT initiatives

  

**Your Profile**
  

* A university degree in Business, IT, Engineering, Life Sciences, or a related field
* Solid experience as a Business Analyst within pharmaceutical, Life Sciences, or regulated clinical environments
* Strong expertise in business analysis disciplines including requirements elicitation, process analysis, stakeholder management, and documentation
* Good understanding of clinical trial processes, GxP environments, and regulatory frameworks (e.g. GCP, GDPR)
* Hands-on experience with clinical IT systems and/or requirements and delivery tools such as Jira, Confluence, or Azure DevOps
* Experience or interest in supporting IT delivery, coordination, or project management activities within clinical or regulated IT initiatives is considered a strong advantage

  

**What we believe you will enjoy about working here**
  

* We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.
* We support your personal development and offer an education library with more than 250 000 (!) courses and educations and certifications.

  

**Application**
  

As part of our recruitment process, identity verification or background checks may occasionally be conducted.
  

  

Valid work permit for Sweden is required.

It delivers end-to-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Software Integration Engineer (Automotive)
description:
At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


**Your role**  

We are looking for an Automotive Software Integration Engineer to build, integrate, and validate software across embedded and cloud-based automotive systems. In this role, you will work closely with cross-functional teams and will drive DevOps practices (including CI/CD, automation, and configuration management) to enable reliable, scalable, and high-quality software delivery in a modern environment throughout the product lifecycle.  

  

  

  

*In this role, you will play a key role in:*
  

* Developing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines to enable automated build, testing, and deployment, while designing and managing robust automated testing frameworks (unit and integration) with reporting and analytics
* Managing Git-based workflows (GitOps), including configuration management, versioning, baselines, and traceability
* Building automation scripts for system integration and operations, and working with modern build systems (e.g., Bazel)
* Implementing Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/Pulumi) and deploying as well as operating cloud-native applications on AWS/Azure using Docker and Kubernetes
* Collaborating closely within agile, cross-functional teams to drive efficient and scalable delivery
  

  

**Your profile**
  

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience)
* Hands-on experience with source code management and GitOps workflows, along with CI/CD tools such as GitHub, GitLab, Gerrit, Zuul, Cynosurus, Jenkins, Artifactory, or GoCD
* Strong background in automated testing, including CI-driven test frameworks and best practices
* Proficiency in Python and Bash scripting, combined with experience in cloud platforms, containerization, and Kubernetes
* Familiarity with observability and monitoring tools (e.g., Grafana, Prometheus), along with an agile mindset and strong collaboration skills
  

**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
  

* We recognize the significance of flexible work arrangements to provide support. Be it remote work, or flexible work hours, you will get an environment to maintain healthy work life balance.
* At the heart of our mission is your career growth. Our array of career growth programs and diverse professions are crafted to support you in exploring a world of opportunities.

title: Senior Engineer – Systematic Equity
description:
### **Who We Are Looking For**


We are looking for an engineer who can take ownership of the platform that supports our equity investment process. This is a hands-on role that combines engineering with technical leadership. You are expected to write code, but also to take responsibility for how our systems run in production, how they are monitored and operated, and how the team works around them.


You have experience with cloud infrastructure and DevOps, and are comfortable making design decisions and setting technical direction within your area of responsibility. While technical experience is essential, we place great importance on personal qualities. We look for individuals who embody our core values: professionalism, humility, generosity, and curiosity. You are pragmatic, collaborative, and take ownership of the work in front of you. AI tools are part of daily engineering at Lynx — we expect you to use them effectively, and to have the judgment to know when their output holds up.

**Required:**

* Programming skills in Python or similar
* Experience with, or strong interest in, running services in production: monitoring, alerting, observability, and CI/CD
* Experience with cloud infrastructure, preferably AWS

**Meriting:**

* Experience taking technical lead responsibility, formally or informally
* Data engineering experience: ETL, data pipelines, and data quality
* Experience integrating external market data
* Background in finance (ideally systematic trading) or another regulated industry
* Experience setting up production and support routines in a small team


You are fluent in English and have the right to work in Sweden. The position is based at our office in central Stockholm.

### **About The Role**


You will join the Systematic Equity team at a formative stage and own the platform our investment process depends on — not just keeping it running, but designing and deciding how it runs. You get the flexibility of a young team with the resources of an established firm behind you. As the strategy scales, so does the role. You will work closely with the researchers in the team, and what you build feeds directly into the investment process.


In practice, the core of the role is keeping trading robust and secure: monitoring, alerting, support routines, incident handling, and troubleshooting are your responsibility, as is designing and building the infrastructure that ties the equity systems together.


External market data is an important input to the investment process, and the role covers its integration, storage, and validation, including building the tools to monitor and control these flows. You will work on the data pipelines together with the researchers, who depend on solid, high-quality input data for their work.


You will also plan and coordinate technical work within the team, across internal stakeholders, and towards external vendors.


To apply, please submit your application **no later than 17 August.**

### **About Us**


Lynx Asset Management is a quantitative asset manager of around 100 people, based in Stockholm. We apply scientific methods to create systematic investment strategies aimed at providing our clients with high risk-adjusted returns and attractive portfolio characteristics. Innovation has been part of our DNA since we were founded in 1999.


At Lynx, we have created a workplace where academic methods and a relentless focus on results are supported by a friendly, collegial culture. The well-being of our employees is especially important to us, as they are the ones who make our success possible. Lynx actively strives to be an inclusive workplace, and we see diversity as a prerequisite for future success.

title: DevOps Engineer / SRE Openshift & Kubernetes
description:
SkillHuset is hiring: DevOps Engineer / SRE – OpenShift & Kubernetes
   

  

 Location: 100% Remote
   

 Work setup: Fully remote
   

 Apply: jobs@skillhuset.se
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced DevOps Engineer / SRE with strong hands-on experience in OpenShift, Kubernetes, automation and platform operations.
   

  

 In this role, you will be part of an Agile team responsible for designing, installing, configuring, maintaining and operating OpenShift Container Platform and related development services. The role includes end-to-end platform responsibility, lifecycle management, automation, reliability, security and operational support.
   

  

 Key responsibilities include:
   

  

 • Take end-to-end responsibility for OpenShift / Kubernetes landscapes
   

 • Design, install, configure and maintain OpenShift Container Platform
   

 • Operate the platform efficiently across incidents, problems, requests and changes
   

 • Support ITIL / ITSM operational processes
   

 • Build automation and self-healing solutions to reduce manual work
   

 • Use CI/CD frameworks for platform lifecycle management
   

 • Provide L2/L3 support for incidents, problems and service requests
   

 • Maintain internal design documentation and user documentation
   

 • Work closely with global teams, colleagues and suppliers
   

  

 We are looking for someone with:
   

  

 • 3+ years of hands-on experience with OpenShift or Kubernetes
   

 • OpenShift or Kubernetes certification
   

 • Experience with Helm or Kustomize
   

 • Experience with GitHub
   

 • Experience with Ansible, GoLang or Terraform
   

 • Knowledge of CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, Tekton or GitHub Actions
   

 • Security-minded approach in all platform activities
   

 • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
   

 • Understanding of Agile, Scrum or SRE concepts
   

 • Strong English communication skills
   

 • Willingness to support standby duty when required
   

  

 Meritorious experience:
   

 ArgoCD, FluxCD, GitOps principles, OpenShift patching and upgrading, monitoring and logging, custom metrics, GoLang-based operator development and customer operator builds.
   

  

 Send your CV to jobs@skillhuset.se with the subject line: DevOps Engineer / SRE – OpenShift Kubernetes
