title: RedHat OpenShift Engineer
description:
This is a job description for a Red Hat OpenShift Architect with proven experience migrating workloads from VMware (vSphere/onprem VMs) to Red Hat OpenShift (Kubernetes). The role focuses on solution architecture, migration planning and execution, platform automation, and ensuring secure, scalable, and highly available OpenShift-based platforms.
 



**Role Overview** 



* Lead architecture, design, and implementation of enterprise OpenShift platforms.
* Execute migration strategies for moving applications and data from VMware virtual machines and traditional architectures to containerized OpenShift environments.
* Work with cross-functional teams (Dev, Security, Networking, Storage) to deliver migration projects with minimal disruption and measurable business value.



**Key Responsibilities** 



* Experience in end-to-end OpenShift platform architectures (high-availability, multi-AZ, multi-cluster, hybrid cloud).
* Create migration strategies (lift-and-shift, replatform, refactor) for VMware-hosted workloads to OpenShift, including phased migration plans and cutover/rollback procedures.
* Lead proofs-of-concept (PoCs), pilot migrations, and production migrations; validate performance, resilience, and security post-migration.
* Build automation for platform provisioning and day‑2 operations using Infrastructure as Code (Ansible, Terraform, OpenShift Ansible/Installer, Operators).
* Define networking, storage, and security models for OpenShift (CNI selection, persistent storage via CSI, RBAC, network policies, service mesh considerations).
* Integrate CI/CD and GitOps pipelines (e.g., Jenkins/GitLab/ArgoCD) for automated app delivery to OpenShift.
* Establish observability and logging (Prometheus, Grafana, EFK/OLM) and implement backup/restore strategies (Velero or equivalent).
* Collaborate with VMware/vSphere teams to assess virtualization inventories, dependencies, and create migration timelines.
* Produce architecture artifacts: diagrams, runbooks, migration playbooks, capacity and cost estimates, and operational runbooks for SRE teams.
* Mentor engineering teams on containerization best practices, operator patterns, and cloud-native application design.
* Ensure compliance with security, governance, and regulatory requirements during and after migration.



**Required Qualifications & Experience** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent experience.
* 8+ years in enterprise infrastructure/cloud roles, with at least 3–5 years specifically designing and operating Red Hat OpenShift or Kubernetes platforms.
* Hands-on experience migrating applications and services from VMware/vSphere (on-prem) to OpenShift/Kubernetes.
* Strong knowledge of VMware stack: vSphere, vCenter, and familiarity with virtualization concepts, VM inventories, and dependency mapping.
* Expertise in OpenShift installation and configuration (IPI/UPI), cluster lifecycle, and operator model.
* Proficiency with Infrastructure-as-Code and automation tools (Terraform, Ansible, OpenShift CLI/oc).
* Solid understanding of networking (CNI plugins, load balancing, DNS), persistent storage and CSI drivers, and storage backends (NFS, Ceph/Rook, SAN).
* Experience with CI/CD and GitOps integration for container deployments.
* Familiar with backup, migration, and application portability tools (e.g., Velero, Red Hat Migrations/operand tools, image registries).
* Strong scripting skills (Bash, Python) and familiarity with container tooling (Docker, Podman).
* Experience defining security posture for Kubernetes/OpenShift (RBAC, OPA/Gatekeeper, secrets management).
* Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and documentation skills.



**Preferred / Nice-to-have** 



* Red Hat certifications: Red Hat Certified Specialist in OpenShift Administration, RHCE, or RHCA.
* Experience with data migration for stateful applications and databases.
* Prior experience running large-scale multi-cluster OpenShift environments and hybrid cloud connectivity (VPN, Direct Connect, ExpressRoute).

title: Cloud Engineer/Architect
description:
Do you have a genuine interest in how business change, new technologies, evolving cloud and infrastructure solutions that help shape the IT landscape?
   

  

 Software & Platform Engineering – your new department:
   

  

 You will become part of a welcoming team of more than 40 highly skilled and engaged colleagues across Sweden. As part of Accenture Technology, a community of 400+ professionals, we collaborate across industries and bring together the right mix of skills for each unique assignment.
   

  

 Our strength lies in the diversity of our experience across technologies, methods, and perspectives and in how we support one another. This makes us a trusted and appreciated partner throughout Accenture’s projects, regardless of size or complexity. Whether the challenge is small or large, local or global, we approach our work with curiosity, care, and confidence. We foster an environment rooted in knowledge sharing, collaboration, and continuous learning, where people are encouraged to grow and succeed together.
   

  

 Use your knowledge and experience to collaborate closely with colleagues and leaders, contributing thoughtfully to innovation and helping shape sustainable, high‑quality solutions for our clients. Your work may include:
   

  

  

- Facilitating client workshops where we share knowledge and work together to explore, plan, and design solutions

- Designing, provisioning, and securing cloud architectures for both global and local business‑critical systems

- Supporting our clients by orchestrating and automating environments from proof‑of‑concept initiatives to production‑ready deployments

- Taking part in architecture and other learning initiatives, both as a learner and by sharing your expertise with others

 Throughout all of this, you will be part of an organization with strong ethical values one that takes pride in its work and places the well‑being and development of its people at the heart of everything it does.
   

  

 We believe: You are passionate about technology and its adoption. You have a strong background in IT infrastructure and are, or want to become, an expert within on-prem, cloud and hybrid cloud solutions, working with the major cloud providers such as Microsoft, AWS, Google and others.
   

  

 You are a team player with a focus on delivery with excellent communication and people skills.
   

  

 Here’s what you need:
   

  

  

- An academic degree, preferably at Master’s level or equivalent experience

- 2-5 years’ experience working with one or more cloud providers’ technologies such as AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, or on-prem technologies

- Experience with cloud ecosystems, from transforming requirements into design all the way down to operations

- Experience as a developer and/or technical architect

- Experience with infrastructure and thinks about automation in all stages of the construction and deployment processes

- The ability to articulate your knowledge to not only other technical people, but also to non-technical business focused people and help them understand what the technology would mean to them and why they should care

- Fluency in Swedish and English is a must, both spoken and written

 Bonus points if you have knowledge/experience in:
   

  

  

- Microservice architecture

- Design and scaling of IT systems

- CI/CD, automation and security

- Container platforms such as OpenShift, Google Anthos, Azure Kubernetes service, VMware Tanzu

- Integration architecture and integration/event solutions such as Cloud Suppliers Integration Services, Kafka, JBoss Fuse, Solace, Mule ESB

- API and Event driven architecture

- Technical architecture-standards, security and frameworks

- Infrastructure as Code (IaC), security controls, monitoring tools, DevOps-tools and services such as GitHub, Azure DevOps, Ant, Maven, Chef, Docker, Git, Jenkins

- Consulting or client service delivery

 How’s it like working for Accenture?  To give you a clearer impression of who we are and what we're looking for, we've asked Michael Nabb to tell us a bit about a career at Accenture:
   

  

*I’ve been with the firm for more than seventeen years and what has been consistent throughout those years has been a close collaboration with clients to help them achieve their goals. I’ve helped some of the largest businesses in the Nordics adapt to a changing world by introducing new technologies or improving the usage of existing ones. I look back and feel proud about playing an important part in the success of our clients.*
*Besides the delivery aspect Accenture has a very strong internal community with groups of interests as diverse as games, art, dance and all sorts of sports which I’ve personally enjoyed having participated in over the years.*
 What do we offer?
   

  

 Our dynamic offices offer a work environment where we enjoy spending time together whether through knowledge‑sharing evenings, breakfasts in the city, or social activities that strengthen our sense of community. With us, you have the opportunity to grow both professionally and personally, and we place strong emphasis on your development and well‑being.
   

  

 Our employees enjoy benefits such as a wellness allowance, health insurance, occupational pension, and enhanced parental leave.
   

  

 We also have our own sports association, Accenture IF, offering activities ranging from ball sports and climbing to sports trips and much more.
   

  

 Accenture’s internal women’s network, WISE (Women In Sweden), aims to engage and empower members while building a strong network across Accenture Sweden.
   

  

 You also have the opportunity to work in a hybrid or remote setup, depending on your assignments. We believe in maintaining a healthy work–life balance and making sure that life outside of work fits together smoothly. Flexible workload – you have control over your everyday life.
   

  

 Interested? If you have any questions regarding the role or the Software & Platform Engineering department, please contact Mathias Wiberg at mathias.wiberg@accenture.com . For questions regarding the position or the recruitment process please contact Lina Zangana, Lina.zangana@accenture.com.
   

  

**Summer Recruitment Update**
 Please note that due to the summer holiday period, there will be a temporary pause in our recruitment process. We will resume reviewing applications and get back to candidates during August/September.
   

  

 Thank you for your patience, and we wish you a wonderful summer!

title: Senior QA Engineer
description:
Evam builds mission-critical technology for the people who keep society safe. Our software is used by police, ambulance, fire & rescue, and other public safety organisations to manage complex, time-critical operations. Every day, Evam supports first responders handling hundreds of thousands of life-threatening incidents.
 



  





 As a Senior QA Engineer, you'll be the person who makes sure our platform behaves correctly when it matters most — when a dispatcher is coordinating an ongoing incident, or when a paramedic is en route to a scene. You'll own the quality strategy across our Spring Boot + Kotlin backend and our React + TypeScript frontend: from test architecture and automation frameworks, to exploratory testing, to release confidence.
 



  





 We're looking for someone who treats quality as a product property, not a phase at the end of a sprint. You'll partner closely with developers — reading their code, pairing on tricky test scenarios, and shaping how testability is designed into the system. You'll define what good coverage looks like, build the tooling to get there, and challenge the team (kindly but firmly) when something isn't ready to ship.
 



  





 This is a deeply technical role with real autonomy. You're not just executing test plans — you're setting the engineering bar for quality across the team.
 



  





 AI is a first-class part of how we work at Evam. We expect you to use modern AI tools as a core part of your daily workflow — for test generation, exploratory analysis, log triage, and accelerating everything from spec authoring to bug investigation.
 



  





 We are on a path to become the leading company in the public safety industry, and we are looking for people who want to be part of that journey and thrive in a high-paced environment. Our team will grow substantially in the coming years, offering you the opportunity to be part of something big from the very beginning.
 



  





**Why Evam** 




  





 Evam exists to save lives. Thousands of times per day. We build mission-critical software for the people who keep society safe. Our software is used by police, ambulance, fire & rescue, and other public safety organisations to manage complex, time-critical operations. Every day, Evam supports first responders handling hundreds of thousands of life-threatening incidents.
 



  





 You'll join a fast-growing company of highly skilled individuals and play a key role in giving those who protect our societies better tools, built for the most critical moments of emergency response.
 



  





 With a proven product, we are now expanding into new markets, aiming to enhance the efficiency of first responder organizations and, ultimately, safeguard our society.
 



  





 We are on a mission to define the next generation of public safety technology.
 



  





**Need to have** 




  




* 5+ years of professional QA / test engineering experience, with senior-level depth in test strategy, automation, and quality ownership
* A strong understanding of our stack: you can read and reason about Spring Boot + Kotlin and React + TypeScript in the frontend, and you're comfortable contributing test code in both
* Hands-on experience with modern test automation — API/integration testing, end-to-end testing (Playwright, Cypress, or similar), and component/unit testing
* Solid grasp of CI/CD pipelines, test environments, and how to keep a test suite fast, stable, and trusted- Experience with non-functional testing where relevant: performance, load, resilience, observability-driven testing
* **AI literacy is a must** 
 — you actively use AI assistants (Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, or similar) in your daily workflow and can show how they change how you design tests, investigate failures, and review code
* Excellent communication in English, both written and verbal — you can write a clear bug report, push back constructively in a review, and explain risk to non-engineers
* A proactive, ownership-driven mindset and genuine care for what the user experiences



  





**Nice to have** 




  




* Experience in regulated, safety-critical, or high-availability domains
* Experience defining QA strategy across multiple teams or services
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure), Kubernetes, and modern observability tooling
* Experience introducing AI-assisted testing practices at a team or org level

title: Systemledare – Counter Small Unmanned Aerial Systems
description:
*Drivs du av att se dina idéer bli verklighet? Välkommen till vår spännande och teknikintensiva värld.*
 Din roll
   

  

 Som ett naturligt näste steg i SAAB:s satsning inom området Counter Unmanned Aerial Systems (C-UAS) inrättas nu en dedikerad enhet under affärsenheten Digital Battlespace Solutions (DBS). Organisationen inleds med en kärngrupp bestående av tre personer: en programledare, en produktledare och en Systemledare.
   

  

 Denna grupp ansvarar för att forma framtidens produkt och erbjudande inom C-UAS. De kommer även att planera och genomföra leveransprojekt med potentiella kunder, samt driva nödvändiga satsningar på produktutveckling och demo-aktiviteter. Gruppen rapporterar till en styrgrupp ledd av P&S inom DBS med deltagare från olika delar av SAAB, då leveransen av en integrerad C-UAS-förmåga involverar flera avdelningar inom företaget.
   

  

 Du kommer att leda det tekniska arbetet med att definiera SAAB:s kommande modulära erbjudande inom Counter Small Unmanned Aerial Systems (C-UAS), som kommer kunna bestå av integration av flera olika typer av sensorer och effektorer beroende på olika kunders behov.
   

  

 Bortsett från att du kommer jobba väldigt nära produktledaren och programledare så kommer du även bli det tekniska navet mellan de olika delsystemleverantörerna, både inom och utanför SAAB, samt understödja dialoger med slutanvändare och andra intressenter utifrån ett tekniskt perspektiv. De flesta av våra system omfattas av höga krav på informationssäkerhet och det kommer bli en naturlig del av ditt arbete att ta hänsyn till det.
   

  

 Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden:
   

  

* Ansvara för det tekniska och systemmässiga arbete med att definiera ett modulart C-UAS erbjudande
* Analysera, utvärdera och rekommendera tekniska lösningar i nya och befintliga system
* Ta fram kravdokumentation för system och funktioner
* Dokumentera systemarkitektur och systemdesign, samt underhåll av befintlig designdokumentation.
* Presentera och motivera valda lösningar internt och för kund
* Samverka med leverantörer av sensorer och effektorer
* Stödja vid offertarbete genom att tillhandahålla tekniskt underlag och riktlinjer till Bid Managers


 Resor förekommer i tjänsten.
   

  

 Din profil
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet som systemingenjör, med förmåga att läsa, formulera och förmedla krav samt bryta ner komplexa systemdesigner till tydliga tekniska krav. Erfarenhet av kravhantering och att definiera krav baserat på kunders önskemål och visioner är en självklar del av din bakgrund.
   

  

 Med en strukturerad och noggrann arbetsstil har du förmåga att göra avvägningar för att säkerställa leverans i tid. Du har hög integritet och gedigen kunskap, vilket gör att du kan övertyga andra om styrkan i dina lösningar. Att arbeta i team och bidra med din expertis och erfarenhet motiverar dig.
   

  

 Du tar initiativ och arbetar självständigt med att hantera komplexa frågeställningar, samtidigt som du analyserar och utvärderar tekniska lösningar. Flexibilitet är en styrka, särskilt vid hantering av snabba förändringar.
   

  

 Krav för tjänsten:
   

  

* Högskole- alt. civilingenjör eller motsvarande.
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av liknande roll.
* Erfarenhet av integration inom både mjukvara och hårdvara
* Kompetens kring kravdefinition och analys, samt tekniska specifikationer
* Vi använder svenska och engelska i vårt dagliga arbete. Detta innebär att du behöver tala och skriva obehindrat på båda språken.


 Meriterande för tjänsten:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av teknologi och system inom radar och/eller GBAD (Ground Based Air Defence)
* Erfarenhet från utveckling av komplexa system med realtidskrav.
* Erfarenhet av integration på system-av-system nivå
* Mer än vardaglig kunskap om Windows


*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.
   

  

 Vänligen observera att urvalsarbetet kommer påbörjas efter v.33.

title: Microsoft Azure Cloud Architect
description:
*Är du en erfaren konsult som brinner för att skapa välfungerande och optimerade molnlösningar? Vill du vara med och skapa framtidens digitalisering med hjälp av Cloud? Hos oss på Accigo får du vara med och stärka cloudaffären samtidigt som du utvecklar ditt självledarskap genom frihet under ansvar.*
 Vem är du?
   

  

 Vi vill jobba med dig som vill vara med och bygga branschens starkaste affär och team inom Azure cloud consulting. Du drivs av teknisk utveckling samtidigt som du är en stjärna på att kommunicera på ett enkelt språk med kunder och kollegor. Du är lyhörd för kundens nuvarande behov och vågar samtidigt utmana befintliga arbetssätt och lösningar.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har
   

  

* Flerårig erfarenhet av design och implementation av lösningar i Azure, inklusive god kännedom om Microsoft well architected framework & Cloud adoption framework.
* Du har jobbat med on premises- eller hybrida system.
* Du är bevandrad inom agilt arbetssätt och har stor kunskap av DevOps.
* Kompetens inom Infrastructure as code (IaC) & PowerShell/CLI
* Du har viss erfarenhet av att designa nätverk och tillhörande komponenter, i Azure och OnPrem.
* Du har erfarenhet inom kravinsamling och presale-arbete
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga och förmågan att leda ditt projekt och dig själv.
* Gedigen erfarenhet som konsult där du jobbat med medelstora och stora bolag.


 Ett plus om du har
   

  

* Du har erfarenhet att vårda kundrelationer och driva säljprocesser
* Erfarenhet av andra publika molntjänster
* Microsoft Certifikat: AZ-104, AZ-305 och AZ-400
* IT-Arkitektcertifiering från Dataföreningen eller liknade instans.
* Erfarenhet av Cisco och Ubiquitinätverkstekniker


 Detta kommer du att göra
   

  

 Vi arbetar med att möjliggöra våra kunders digitalseringsresor genom att vara djupt tekniska specialister på kundens teknikplattformar, med utgångspunkt i Microsofts ekosystem. Du kommer jobba med kunder som behöver hjälp att flytta upp sina On Premis miljöer till Azure. Du kommer att designa lösningarna utifrån kundens krav och Microsoft well architected framework. Samt hjälpa till att implementera lösningarna.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt på gemensamma teamleveranser och vi samarbetar ofta med andra team på Accigo. Därför är det viktigt att du trivs med att jobba tillsammans med andra och samtidigt tar ansvar för din egen leverans.
   

  

 I din roll som Cloud-arkitekt kommer du att agera lösningsarkitekt i våra kunduppdrag, hjälpa till med införsäljning, genomföra externa och interna kompetensutvecklingsinitiativ, design och uppsättning av Azurelösningar, samt hands-on och problemlösning. Du förväntas driva uppdrag och ta stort eget ansvar i dina projekt. Du kommer med din kompetens och branscherfarenhet vara en mycket viktig länk mellan affärsverksamhet och IT-infrastrukturen i Azure.
   

  

 Vårt team
   

  

 Vi är ett nyfiket och samarbetsvilligt team, med ett gemensamt brinnande intresse för teknik och digitalisering. Vi ser oss som Sveriges vassaste (och gladaste) team inom våra fokusområden, och har en långsiktig strategi att växa och bli fler. Vi arbetar dagligen med varandra, både i kundleveranser och med erbjudandeutveckling och att driva våra fokusområden.
   

  

 Förutom att arbeta tillsammans bjuder vi även in till frukostar där vi delar med oss av pinsamheter och udda fakta, kompetensspridning, veckovisa team-träffar och spontana fikastunder. Vi strävar efter att skapa en vardag fylld med spännande projekt och möjligheter hos kund, samt glädje, energi och gemenskap i teamet där dina idéer får ta plats.
   

  

 Kompensation och förmåner
   

  

 Vår förmånspolicy är utvecklad för att möta både dina professionella och personliga behov. I vårt omfattande förmånspaket ingår friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension och frivillig sjukvårdsförsäkring. Vår ersättningsmodell består av en konkurrenskraftig fast del och en rörlig del som ger dig möjlighet att påverka din lön baserat på din prestation och ambition. Vi erbjuder både professionell och personlig utveckling.
   

  

 Har du några frågor eller är du bara nyfiken? Vi berättar gärna mer om oss över en kaffe:
 *tyra.drakenberg@accigo.se*
 Accigo är ett konsultbolag som hjälper företag och organisationer med digital affärs- och verksamhetsutveckling med tekniken som möjliggörare. För oss handlar digitalisering till 90% om människor och 10% om teknik. Det är när samspelet mellan människa och teknik fungerar som digitaliseringens fulla styrka visar sig.
   

  

 För många handlar digitalisering mest om teknik. För oss är det så otroligt mycket större. Digitalisering kan få både människor och organisationer att våga sikta högre, följa sina drömmar och öppna dörrar som de inte ens visste fanns. Och när man ser igenom tekniken och börjar skönja vilka möjligheter som gömmer sig där bakom. Då ser man att framtiden kan vara en fantastisk plats – fylld av mänsklig energi och värme – och digitalisering är inget annat än vår superkraft för att komma dit.

title: Technical Account Manger - AWS
description:
Som
 **Technical Account Manager (TAM)** 
 för AWS hos Ingram Micro blir du en betrodd teknisk rådgivare till våra AWS-partners i Norden. Din roll är att tillhandahålla teknisk vägledning, säkerställa rätt lösningsstrategi och ge arkitekturstöd som bidrar till våra partners framgång och accelererar deras användning av AWS.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta nära säljorganisationen, Vendor Management och Cloud Architects för att säkerställa att våra partners har rätt tekniska förutsättningar och det strategiska stöd som krävs för att utveckla sin AWS-affär.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden:**
* Vara den primära tekniska kontaktpersonen för AWS- partners och ge rådgivning kring arkitektur, best practices och lösningsdesign.
* Stödja onboarding av nya partners ur ett tekniskt perspektiv och säkerställa en smidig integration med Ingram Micros AWS- plattform och tjänster.
* Genomföra tekniska enablement- sessioner, lösningsworkshops och ge pre-sales-stöd till partnernas tekniska team.
* Kartlägga partnernas kompetens och mognadsgrad i förhållandet till AWS partnerprogram och hjälpa dem att utvecklas genom sin AWS Partner Journey.
* Driva användningen av AWS-verktyg, program och tjänster, inklusive Well- Architected Reviews, credits och Proof of Concepts (POCs).
* Arbeta nära Cloud Architects för att identifiera affärsmöjligheter och designa skalbara lösningar utifrån partnernas och slutkundens behov.
* Säkerställa att tekniska insikter och partnerutveckling dokumenteras korrekt i CRM och interna planeringsverktyg.
* Samarbeta med AWS Vendor Management och Go-to-Market (GTM)-team för att identifiera affärsmöjligheter och tillsammans utveckla tekniska värdeerbjudanden.
* Stödja interna utbildningsinsatser och agera teknisk lead i viktiga AWS- initiativ och kampanjer.


**Kompetens och kvalifikationer:**
* Minst tre års erfarenhet av arbete inom Cloud, pre-sales eller andra tekniska kundnära roller, gärna med AWS eller andra hyperscaler- plattformar.
* God förståelse för AWS kärntjänster såsom Compute, Storage, Networking, Security och DevOps.
* Förmåga att kommunicera tekniska koncept på ett tydligt och pedagogiskt sätt till både tekniska och icke-tekniska intressenter.
* Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift, är ett krav.
* AWS- certifieringar (t.ex, Cloud Practitioner, Solutions Architect Associate), är meriterande.
* Erfarenhet av partnerekosystem, value-based selling och lösningsdesign är meriterande.

title: Backendutvecklare inom Java
description:
Om du vill arbeta som konsult med fokus på Java-utveckling? Läs vidare!
   

  

 Här får du tryggheten i en stabil anställning och friheten att utvecklas genom uppdrag som gör skillnad, både för dig och för samhället. På Nexer ser vi varje uppdrag som en chans att växa. Som konsult hos oss får du möjlighet att bredda din kompetens inom olika tekniker och branscher, samtidigt som du har en trygg bas. Vi tror på långsiktighet och lägger stor vikt vid både kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och en hållbar balans mellan arbete och privatliv.
   

  

**Om dig**
 Vi tror att du är en person som trivs i komplexa miljöer där arkitektur, teknik och verksamhetsbehov möts. Du är trygg i din kompetens, van att ta ansvar och har en naturlig förmåga att skapa riktning i både team och uppdrag. Du är lyhörd för andras idéer men räds inte för att bidra med egna perspektiv och initiativ. Du kan kommunicera tydligt när det behövs och du vill vara en del av ett lag som arbetar mot gemensamma mål.
   

  

 För att stärka vårt team ytterligare söker vi nu en senior Javautvecklare. Vi söker dig som tycker om att vara nära koden. Du är trygg i att översätta verksamhetsbehov till hållbara tekniska lösningar och du uppskattar att arbeta i uppdrag där modernisering, integrationer och säkerhet är centrala delar. Våra uppdrag kräver att du har svenskt medborgarskap samt kan vara på plats i Stockholm.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Minst nio års erfarenhet av Javautveckling med tillhörande relevanta verktyg
* Erfarenhet av Spring Boot
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD
* Erfarenhet av agila metoder såsom Scrum eller SAFe
* Erfarenhet av något modernt frontendramverk såsom Angular, React eller Vue
* Mycket god förmåga att kommunicera på svenska i både tal och skrift


**Det är meriterande om du har:**
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar såsom AWS eller Google Cloud
* Erfarenhet av utveckling på Openshift eller annan Kubernetes-baserad plattform
* Erfarenhet av offentlig verksamhet


***Om Tech Consulting Stockholm***
*Tech Consulting Stockholm hjälper kunder i både privat och offentlig sektor med kompetens inom IT och digitalisering. Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i utvecklande uppdrag, vara nära både kund och team samt bidra till att bygga en växande konsultenhet i Stockholm.*
**Ansökan**
 Du är varmt välkommen att söka tjänsten genom att skicka in din ansökan här nedan. Enligt GDPR hanterar vi inte ansökningar via e post, men har du frågor om tjänsten eller Nexer är du välkommen att höra av dig till ansvarig rekryterare, Natalie Svensson, Natalie.Svensson@nexergroup.com
   

  

 Vi tar emot ansökningar löpande så vänta inte med att söka!
   

  

 Läs mer om Nexer här:
   

  

 www.nexergroup.com

title: Research Scientist - Generative Audio
description:
We are seeking Research Scientists (across all levels of seniority) to join our Artist-First AI Music Lab. Our team pioneers and advances state-of-the-art generative technologies for music that create breakthrough experiences for fans and artists. We invent entirely new listening experiences that center and celebrate artists and creatives. All of our products will put artists and songwriters first, through these four principles:
   

  

* Partnerships with record labels, distributors, and music publishers: We’ll develop new products for artists and fans through upfront agreements, not by asking for forgiveness later.
* Choice in participation: We recognize there’s a wide range of views on the use of generative music tools within the artistic community. Therefore, artists and rightsholders will choose if and how to participate to ensure the use of AI tools aligns with the values of the people behind the music.
* Fair compensation and new revenue: We will build products that create wholly new revenue streams for rightsholders, artists, and songwriters, ensuring they are properly compensated for the use of their work and transparently credited for their contributions.
* Artist-fan connection: AI tools we develop will not replace human artistry. They will give artists new ways to be creative and connect with fans. We will leverage our role as the place where more than 700 million people already come to listen to music every month to ensure that generative AI deepens artist-fan connections.


 Learn more in our press release: https://newsroom.spotify.com/2025-10-16/artist-first-ai-music-spotify-collaboration/
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 Conduct groundbreaking research in generative audio using diffusion or flow matching models, with a focus on one or more of the following areas:
   

  

**Vocal Synthesis** 
 — Research in vocal and speech synthesis, along with related areas such as ML-based audio processing and signal processing.
   

  

**Post-Training** 
 — Research in post-training techniques for music generation, including preference alignment methods (such as DPO, RLHF, or KTO), reward model design and training, and reinforcement learning to improve output quality, controllability, and human preference adherence.
   

  

**Editing** 
 — Research in iterative music generation and audio editing, including capabilities such as stem replacement, instrumentation change, mood changes (while preserving content), tempo changes, and structure changes.
   

  

 You will also:
   

  

* Run large-scale experiments with access to Spotify's extensive infrastructure and an audience of more than 700 million monthly active users.
* Create practical applications that harness generative technologies and push the boundaries of what's possible in listening experiences.
* Collaborate as part of a cross-functional team—working closely with scientists, engineers, product managers, designers, user researchers, and analysts—to craft innovative solutions to complex challenges.
* Have a direct impact on Spotify's products, tools, and services, working on projects that influence the entire organization.
* Engage with the broader research community by publishing your findings, delivering talks, and attending top conferences.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have a Ph.D. in Computer Science, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related field. Previous industry experience is helpful.
* You have experience in one or more of the following fields: generative modeling, machine learning, music information retrieval, speech processing, audio processing, signal processing, probabilistic modeling, computer vision, or related areas.
* You have deep expertise in at least one of the focus areas above—whether that's vocal/speech synthesis, post-training alignment techniques (e.g., PPO, GRPO, DPO), or audio-to-audio generation and text-guided music editing.
* You have publications at leading conferences such as ICASSP, ISMIR, INTERSPEECH, ICLR, AAAI, IJCAI, NeurIPS, ICML, CVPR, ECCV, ICCV, or related venues.
* You have strong coding skills in Python, PyTorch, and NumPy.
* You are a creative problem solver who is passionate about building outstanding products that add real value to millions of people.
* You are enthusiastic about turning research ideas into products operating at scale.
* You can explain complex topics in simple terms, and you enjoy building strong relationships with colleagues and stakeholders.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location
* This team operates within the Central European and GMT time zone for collaboration.
* Core working hours are CET 3pm-6pm / EST 9am-12pm.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: OE Process Specialist
description:
Are you passionate about transforming the future of work through AI and automation? Join us to lead impactful process transformation initiatives, collaborate with stakeholders across the business, and turn innovative AI opportunities into real-world solutions that improve customer experiences and drive measurable business results.
   

  

**This is what makes the position as** 
**OE Process Specialist** 
**unique**
* Play a key role in shaping the organization's AI transformation by facilitating impactful workshops and turning innovative ideas into real business improvements.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives that directly influence how teams adopt, optimize, and scale AI-powered ways of working.
* Collaborate across functions and stakeholders, positioning yourself at the forefront of AI adoption and organizational change.


 My name is Sabina Wallenborg. I am the VP Customer Operations. As a leader, I am authentic, empowering, and genuinely curious, and I believe the best results come from creating a supportive and collaborative environment where people feel trusted, valued, and inspired to grow. I am passionate about helping my teams build on their strengths, succeed together, and make a meaningful impact for our customers and business.
   

  

**Your role & influence as** 
**OE Process Specialist**
*Responsibility* 
 : You will be given responsibility for identifying and turning business challenges into AI-powered solutions that simplify ways of working, enhance customer experiences, and create measurable business value.
   

  

*Collaboration* 
 : Together with your team, you take care of enabling the successful adoption of AI and process innovation across the organization. You'll work closely not only with your immediate team members but also with departments across the business, partnering with process owners, business stakeholders, and technology teams to bring ideas to life and ensure lasting impact.
   

  

**Core Activities**
* Identify, analyze, and redesign business processes to uncover AI and automation opportunities that improve efficiency, customer experience, and operational performance.
* Lead and support AI initiatives from pilot and testing through deployment and scaling, working closely with business stakeholders, process owners, and technology teams.
* Monitor business impact, drive user adoption, and champion continuous improvement to ensure AI solutions deliver sustainable value across the organization.


**Benefits Of Joining Dustin**
 We believe there's more to Dustin than just the benefits listed here. You'll fully understand this once you're with us. Curious? Our Life at Dustin page has you covered.
   

  

**For This Role Specific You Can Expect**
**You can find more of our benefits below in the vacancy.**
**This Is What We Imagine You Bring**
 We envision you as a curious and driven individual who is passionate about transforming the way organizations work by leveraging AI, automation, and process excellence to create meaningful business impact
   

  

**Additionally, It's Important That**
* You have a bachelor's degree level of working and thinking
* You have 3–8+ years of experience in process improvement, operational excellence, business analysis, consulting, transformation, or related roles.
* AI, automation, digital transformation, or continuous improvement initiatives.
* Driving pilot programs, implementation, adoption, and scaling of new technologies and ways of working.


**What can you expect next?**
 To Ensure a Fair Recruitment Process Free From Unconscious Bias, We Handle Your Application Anonymously And Do Not Accept Cover Letters. Please Refrain From Sending One, So That The Selection Is Based Solely On Professional Competencies. We Expect The Following Steps In The Recruitment Process
   

  

* Telephone screening with TA partner, Sander Dirks
* 1st interview with VP Customer Operations, Sabina Wallenborg and Team Manager Quality Assurance, Malin Olastuen
* Assessment (Personality- and cognitive thinking test)
* 2nd interview with HR
* Background check


 For questions about the position, please contact the TA Partner Sander Dirks via e-mail.
   

  

**Please note; From 16th of July till the 3rd of August, Sander Dirks will be offline.**
* How to Become a Dustineer
   

  

  

  

	+ Life at Dustin
	   
	
	  
	
	  
	
	  
	
		- Our products & services
		   
		
		  
		
		  
		
		  
		
		 Dustin is a leading online based IT partner in the Nordics and the Benelux. We help our customers to stay in the forefront by providing them with the right IT solution for their needs.
		   
		
		  
		
		 We offer approximately 280,000 products with related services to companies, the public sector and private individuals. Sales for the financial year 2023/24 amounted to approximately SEK 21.5 billion and more than 90 per cent of the revenues came from the corporate market.
		   
		
		  
		
		 Dustin has approximately 2,000 employees and has been listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2015 with headquarters in Nacka Strand just outside central Stockholm.

title: Senior mjukvaruutvecklare
description:
*Drivs du av att se dina idéer bli verklighet? Välkommen till vår spännande och teknikintensiva värld.*
**Din roll**
 Du blir en del av avdelningen som utvecklar ledningssystem för flygledning, en miljö där tekniken bidrar till att hålla flygtrafiken säker och flytande. I den här rollen ligger fokus på att utveckla avancerade och högpresterande användargränssnitt där stora mängder information presenteras på ett tydligt, intuitivt och responsivt sätt.
   

  

 Du arbetar med att utveckla visualiseringar och gränssnitt som hjälper användare att fatta beslut i komplexa situationer. Här får du kombinera tekniskt djup med användarupplevelse och bidra till lösningar där prestanda, användbarhet och kvalitet är avgörande. Du samarbetar nära utvecklare, arkitekter, UX-designers och produktägare i ett tvärfunktionellt team och är med och påverkar både tekniska vägval och framtida arkitektur.
   

  

 Har du erfarenhet från spelutveckling eller andra miljöer där höga krav ställs på grafik, visualisering och prestanda kommer du att känna dig hemma hos oss
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av att utveckla avancerade
   

  

 användargränssnitt och som trivs med att lösa tekniska utmaningar där prestanda, användarupplevelse och kvalitet står i fokus. Du är analytisk, nyfiken och delar gärna med dig av din kunskap till kollegor.
   

  

 Vi tror att du har:
   

  

* Flera års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling med fokus på användargränssnitt och


 visualisering
   

  

* Kandidat- eller masterexamen inom datavetenskap, teknisk fysik eller motsvarande


 tekniskt område
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att utveckla högpresterande gränssnitt i spelmotorer, Qt-ramverket


 eller liknande tekniska miljöer
   

  

* Goda kunskaper i C++, C# eller andra relevanta programmeringsspråk
* Erfarenhet av Git, Linux och moderna utvecklingsmetoder
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


 Meriterande
   

  

* Erfarenhet av spelutveckling, särskilt strategispel eller andra visualiseringstunga


 applikationer
   

  

* Erfarenhet av Qt/QML eller andra moderna ramverk för användargränssnitt
* Erfarenhet av realtidsgrafik, visualisering eller rendering med höga prestandakrav
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetskritiska eller regulatoriska system
* Erfarenhet av att leda tekniska initiativ eller coacha mer juniora utvecklare


*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
**Vad blir du en del av**
 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här
   

  

 Om du är intresserad av vilka förmåner som du kan ta del av som anställd på Saab i Sverige, kan du läsa om dem här
   

  

 Med tanke på den kommande semesterperioden kan du förvänta dig återkoppling på din ansökan efter sommaren. Om du tycker att tjänsten låter intressant är du varmt välkommen att skicka in din ansökan redan idag!

title: Nattreceptionist Scandic Örebro Väst, heltid
description:
Ansök nu
* Ansök senast: 24 juli 2026
* Örebro
* Arbete på plats
**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

Tre kilometer utanför Örebro city, ett par svängar från E18 och E20 ligger Scandic Örebro Väst- en perfekt utgångspunkt för att utforska stadens kultur och nöjen. Våra gäster kan känna sig som hemma i vår restaurang, ta en drink i baren och koppla av i soffan framför öppna spisen.


Vi vill vara det självklara hotellet när man väljer att besöka Örebro. Det gör vi genom att ha en stark servicekultur och ett hotell i toppklass men den allra viktigaste biten är de som gör det otroliga arbetet för vi ska nå dit- våra medarbetare. Därför är vi måna att dagligen uppmuntra varandra och hålla en god stämning i teamet.



**Nu söker vi en nattreceptionist till Scandic Örebro Väst.**



Oavsett varför gästen kommer till oss är det få saker som är så uppskattade som ett vänligt ansikte som hälsar välkommen. Du agerar värd tillsammans med övriga teamet på hotellet och skapar en gästupplevelse i världsklass.



Hos oss får du ta ett stort eget ansvar för att ta de beslut som krävs för att göra gästen nöjd och teamen utvecklar och förbättrar arbetssätt och service i takt med att omvärlden förändras. Vi är nämligen övertygade om att det är när du får utvecklas och bidra med all din kompetens och erfarenhet som vi överträffar gästens förväntningar. På köpet får vi kul på jobbet!



Så ta med dig dina erfarenheter, ditt engagemang och ditt sätt att tänka till oss – och bidra till en kultur där vi bryr oss på riktigt: om varandra, våra gäster och vår planet. Välkommen till Scandic!


**Vad är innebär rollen?**



Du som arbetar i receptionen är ansvarig för att våra gäster får service i världsklass. Du är spindeln i nätet som ser till att gästen alltid är i fokus. Du är den som går igenom ankomstlistan och lägger tid på detaljerna. Ser till att gästens önskemål uppfylls. Du har alltid ett leende på läpparna och en kreativ lösning i bakfickan. Du löser det mesta och är en stjärna på att vända en missnöjd gäst till en nöjd gäst. Din arbetsplats är vår lobby. För det är där du möter flest gäster. I ansvarsområdet ingår även administrativt arbete, säkerhetsarbete och arbete med försäljning.


Arbetet i receptionen innebär att checka in och ut hotellets gäster, hälsa välkommen och ge gästen den information den behöver om sin vistelse. Du hanterar bokningar i systemet Opera Cloud och hanterar administrativa uppgifter runt gäster och säkerhet. Allt arbete sker med gästnöjdhet och försäljning i fokus.


Den här tjänsten är lagd nattetid, så du behöver kunna hantera olika typer av situationer på egen hand i första hand och känna dig trygg i ensamrollen.


**Vem är du?**



För att passa i rollen tror vi att du har en väl utvecklad social förmåga och är kapabel att hantera att det händer många olika saker samtidigt. Det är mycket viktigt att du kan förmedla ett gott värdskap till hotellets gäster.



Du har också vana och kunskap i att arbeta med dator som arbetsredskap.


Eftersom arbetet till stor del består av att kommunicera med gäster är goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska en förutsättning. Talar du ytterligare ett språk är det meriterande.


Allra viktigast är dock dina personliga egenskaper och din inställning. För att passa i rollen behöver du vara en lyhörd och prestigelös lagspelare som tar ett stort ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och helhetsresultatet.


Du behöver även kunna vara självgående då nattetid är man till största del själv på hotellet, så eget ansvar för både hotellet och sina arbetsuppgifter är otroligt viktiga.


**Information om tjänsten**



Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid.


Vi tillämpar provanställning. Arbetet innebär nattskift, vardagar och helger. Startdatum i början på september, upplärning sker på plats innan. Kan tillsättas tidigare.


Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vår hemsida. Alla ansökningar kommer att behandlas löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag, varför vi ber dig att ansöka så snart som möjligt. I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av ett enklare test om service vid urvalet.



Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till oss på Scandic!



Ps. på vår hemsida kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, vad tjänsten innebär och om våra förmåner!
company_description: Nordiskt hotellföretag i världsklass som skapar enastående upplevelser för de många människorna. 16 000 medarbetar, 280 hotell i 6 länder.

title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Cloud Infrastructure Management
* ID 516379-en\_US
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.


Do you want to work with one of Sweden’s most critical IT infrastructures? We are looking for an Infrastructure Engineer / System Programmer (SysProg) to join our mainframe team and help operate and modernise our z/OS platform in a highly secure, business critical environment.


**The role**
  

You will be part of a skilled mainframe team responsible for the stability, availability, and evolution of our z/OS environment. The role combines deep technical system programming with operational responsibility and close collaboration across IT and the business.
  

  

In this role you will play a key role in:
  

* System programming and maintenance of z/OS and related subsystems
* Work closely with domain owners for MQ on z/OS, IMS and/or DB2 (depending on your profile)
* Software installation, upgrades, and maintenance using SMP/E
* Incident investigation, problem management, and operational support
* Manage certificates, encryption, and security related configurations
* Participate in on call duty and planned infrastructure activities, such as datacentre swaps and major changes
* Contribute to modernisation, automation, and continuous improvements

  

**Your profile**
  

* Has solid experience working with IBM z/OS in a system programming or senior infrastructure role
* Strong knowledge of software maintenance and installation using SMP/E
* Solid understanding of mainframe security, including certificates, PKI, encryption, and key management
* Is comfortable working in 24/7, high availability environments
* Is structured, proactive, and enjoys taking ownership
* Enjoys working both independently and as part of a small expert team
* Curious and motivated to continuously develop your skills
* Calm and methodical under pressure in incident situations

  

**Nice to have**
  

* Cross platform integration (z/OS distributed systems)
* Experience from financial or other regulated environments
* Automation, monitoring, and alerting on the mainframe
* Knowledge of additional z/OS subsystems or middleware products

**What we believe you will enjoy about working here**
  

* A key role in Sweden’s financial market infrastructure
* A collaborative, highly skilled technical environment
* Competitive benefits and flexible working conditions

**Application**  

Due to vacation period we will start process applications second week of August.


*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks will be carried out as required.*  

  

#LI-JF1


Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
  

Make it real | www.capgemini.com
company_description: Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.

title: Forward Deployed Engineer - Systems
description:
**Location**
------------


Stockholm


**Employment Type**
-------------------


Full time


**Department**
--------------


Engineering


  
**About Us:**
-------------


**AI needs a new infrastructure layer. We're building it at Modal.**


Every era of computing brought new workloads that previous infrastructure couldn't support: mainframes, databases, and the cloud. Each time, the company that rebuilt the layer underneath defined the decade. AI is no different, except it touches everything instead of one slice, and the window to build the layer underneath it is open right now.


Our customers include category-defining companies like Lovable, Ramp, Cognition, DoorDash, and Suno. They rely on Modal for instant GPU access, sub-second container starts, and native storage, so it's simple to serve low-latency inference, fine-tune models, and access production-ready sandboxes at scale.


We recently raised a $355M Series C at a $4.65B valuation, led by General Catalyst and Redpoint Ventures. We've crossed $300M+ ARR and grown fivefold since September.


Our team includes creators of popular open-source projects (e.g.,Seaborn,Luig**i**), academic researchers, international olympiad medalists, and experienced engineering and product leaders with decades of experience.


**The Role:**
-------------


Modal is seeking an experienced Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE) to partner with our sales team and drive technical sales success. As an FDE, you will be the technical voice in our sales process, working directly with Account Executives to help enterprise customers understand how Modal can transform their AI/ML infrastructure. You will:


* Partner with Account Executives to identify, qualify, and close strategic enterprise opportunities
* Lead technical discovery sessions with prospective customers to understand their current infrastructure, pain points, and requirements
* Design and present compelling technical solutions that demonstrate how Modal addresses customer needs
* Architect migration paths from existing cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure) to Modal's serverless platform
* Conduct technical demos, experiments, and proof-of-concepts that showcase Modal's capabilities
* Navigate complex technical evaluations and address security, compliance, and integration concerns
* Build trusted advisor relationships with technical decision-makers including CTOs, VPs of Engineering, and ML Engineering leads
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams to communicate customer feedback and influence product roadmap
* Support contract negotiations by providing technical expertise on implementation timelines, resource requirements, and success metrics

**Requirements:**
-----------------


* 5+ years of experience in solutions engineering, sales engineering, or customer-facing technical roles
* Deep hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) including compute, storage, networking, and managed services
* Strong knowledge of containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes, container orchestration)
* Experience with databases (SQL/NoSQL), data pipelines, and distributed systems architecture
* Understanding of ML/AI infrastructure challenges including model training, inference, and MLOps workflows
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi, CloudFormation) and CI/CD pipelines
* Proven track record of supporting enterprise software sales cycles ($100K+ ACV)
* Exceptional presentation and communication skills with ability to explain complex technical concepts to both technical and business audiences
* Strong business acumen with understanding of enterprise buying processes and procurement
* Experience building migration strategies and implementation roadmaps for large-scale infrastructure changes
* Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams including sales, product, and engineering
* Experience selling or implementing serverless computing, container platforms, or ML infrastructure solutions preferred
* Willingness to travel up to 30% for customer meetings and industry events
* Ability to work in-person in our Stockholm office

description:
**Location**

Stockholm

**Department**
--------------


Engineering


  
**About Us:**
-------------


**AI needs a new infrastructure layer. We're building it at Modal.**


Every era of computing brought new workloads that previous infrastructure couldn't support: mainframes, databases, and the cloud. Each time, the company that rebuilt the layer underneath defined the decade. AI is no different, except it touches everything instead of one slice, and the window to build the layer underneath it is open right now.


Our customers include category-defining companies like Lovable, Ramp, Cognition, DoorDash, and Suno. They rely on Modal for instant GPU access, sub-second container starts, and native storage, so it's simple to serve low-latency inference, fine-tune models, and access production-ready sandboxes at scale.


We recently raised a $355M Series C at a $4.65B valuation, led by General Catalyst and Redpoint Ventures. We've crossed $300M+ ARR and grown fivefold since September.


Our team includes creators of popular open-source projects (e.g.,Seaborn,Luig**i**), academic researchers, international olympiad medalists, and experienced engineering and product leaders with decades of experience.


**The Role:**
-------------


We're looking for Forward Deployed ML Engineers who want to work at the intersection of deep technical work and direct customer impact. As an ML FDE, you'll partner with leading AI companies and foundation model labs to help them achieve state-of-the-art performance on their most demanding workloads — LLM serving, model training (SFT, RLHF), audio pipelines, scientific computing, and more. You're helping teams reach outcomes most engineers can't on their own.


The FDE team today includes world-class software engineers, computational scientists, ML engineers, and former founders. We're looking for people with strong engineering fundamentals, deep curiosity across the AI stack, and energy for working directly with customers on hard problems. You will:


* Work hands-on with companies like Suno, Lovable, Cognition, and Meta to architect and optimize production AI workloads on Modal
* Contribute to open-source projects — members of the team are active contributors to SGLang — and publish technical content that demonstrates Modal's capabilities across the AI stack
* Collaborate with Modal's product and sales teams, contributing to the platform as both an engineer and a product stakeholder
* Build trusted relationships with technical leaders (CTOs, VPs of Engineering, ML leads) at companies doing frontier AI work
* Conduct technical demos, experiments, and proof-of-concepts that make Modal's performance advantages tangible

**Requirements:**
-----------------


* 2+ years of professional ML engineering experience, ideally with hands-on work in inference optimization, model training, GPU programming, or ML infrastructure
* Familiarity with the serving (e.g., vLLM, SGLang) and training (e.g., slime, verl, TRL) toolchains. You don't need all of these, but you should be able to go deep on at least one.
* Strong communicator who can go deep on technical architecture with an engineering team and clearly articulate tradeoffs to technical leadership
* Genuine interest in working directly with customers — you find it energizing to understand someone else's problem and help them solve it
* Bonus: side projects, open-source contributions, or published work you're proud of in ML or systems performance
* Willing to work in-person in Stockholm

title: Fault Tracing Engineer – Telematics & Connectivity
description:
About the Role
  
We are looking for a Fault Tracing Engineer with experience in telematics, connectivity, and automotive systems.
  
In this role, you will become part of a cross-functional engineering environment focused on identifying, analyzing, and solving complex quality issues within connected vehicle systems. You will work hands-on with troubleshooting, root-cause analysis, and improvement activities to ensure reliable and high-quality solutions for customers.
  
The role combines technical investigation, system understanding, data analysis, and collaboration with different engineering teams and suppliers. You will contribute both to solving current issues and improving future products and processes.
  
We are looking for someone who is not only technically skilled but also has the right personality, strong drive, and motivation to make a difference. A proactive mindset and willingness to take ownership are key success factors in this role.
  
  

Responsibilities
  
  

**As a Fault Tracing Engineer, you will:**  

Investigate and troubleshoot systematic quality issues within telematics and connectivity systems.
  
Analyze onboard and offboard system behavior to identify root causes.
  
Investigate field reports, technical data, logs, and system performance.
  
Perform fault tracing across hardware, software, communication networks, and connected services.
  
Support corrective actions together with internal engineering teams and external partners.
  
Contribute to improving tools, methods, and processes for proactive quality monitoring.
  
Support Electrical & Electronics-related quality investigations when required.
  
Drive continuous improvements of products, services, and development processes.
  
Lead smaller technical investigations independently while collaborating with cross-functional teams.
  
  

Required Qualifications
  
Several years of experience within the automotive industry.
  
Technical background within telematics, connectivity, embedded systems, or related areas.
  
  

**Experience with:**  

Connectivity troubleshooting
  
Telematics system design
  
Verification and validation of connected systems
  
Embedded vehicle systems
  
Hardware and software fault analysis
  
Strong technical problem-solving skills and a quality-focused mindset.
  
Experience analyzing technical data and system behavior.
  
Ability to work independently and take ownership of investigations.
  
Good communication skills and ability to collaborate across different technical areas.
  
Fluent English communication skills.
  
  

Meritorious Skills
  
  

**Experience with:**  

Automotive connectivity solutions and telematics platforms.
  
  

**Vehicle communication networks and protocols, such as:**  

TCP/IP
  
CAN
  
Other automotive communication interfaces
  
Reading and analyzing system logs, preferably within Linux environments.
  
Connected vehicle services and cloud-based automotive solutions.
  
Automotive development processes and engineering tools.
  
Experience from commercial vehicles is highly beneficial.
  
Bus driving license (Category D) is an advantage.
  
  

Personal Profile
  
  

**We are looking for a person who:**  

Has a strong technical curiosity and enjoys solving complex problems.
  
Takes initiative and drives activities forward.
  
Is structured, analytical, and detail-oriented.
  
Can see both the technical details and the bigger system perspective.
  
Has a strong sense of responsibility and commitment to quality.
  
Enjoys collaboration and building relationships with different teams.
  
Has a positive attitude and the motivation to continuously learn and improve.
  
  

Personality and drive are highly important for this role. We are looking for someone who actively contributes, challenges existing solutions, and wants to create measurable improvements.
  
  

Language
  
English is required.
  
Swedish language skills are considered an advantage but are not mandatory.
  
  

**Location:** Gothenburg, Sweden
  
**Start date:** According to agreement

title: Product Manager CRM
description:
Are you passionate about creating exceptional customer experiences through digital solutions? Do you enjoy bridging business needs and technology while driving the development of CRM capabilities in a global organisation?
  
About Nederman
  
At Nederman, we are proud to be a global leader in industrial air filtration and clean air solutions. We bring together global expertise, engineering, product development, innovation, and digital capabilities in a modern and collaborative environment.
  
It is a place where long-term industrial experience since 1944 meets modern digital development, and where the work you do has a direct impact on how we engage with customers and drive growth across Nederman companies worldwide.
  
What you can expect
  
Based at our headquarters in Helsingborg, you will be part of a modern and collaborative environment where global expertise meets local team spirit. You will build a strong international network and work closely with colleagues across sales, marketing, customer service, digital, and IT functions around the world.
  
You will play a key role in shaping Nederman's CRM landscape and customer engagement capabilities. With an ambitious digital roadmap and cloud-first strategy, you will have excellent opportunities to learn, grow, and influence the future direction of our customer-facing solutions.
  
The Role
  
As Product Manager CRM, you will own and drive the development of our global CRM platform and processes. You will act as the bridge between business stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring that CRM capabilities support our commercial objectives and deliver value to customers and users globally.
  
What you will do
  
Own the CRM product roadmap and prioritise initiatives aligned with business goals
  
Gather, analyse, and translate business requirements into scalable CRM solutions
  
Partner with sales, marketing, customer service, and digital teams to improve customer journeys and processes
  
Manage and prioritise the product backlog together with key stakeholders
  
Drive continuous improvement, adoption, and value realisation from the CRM platform through project or changes
  
Facilitate workshops, planning sessions, and stakeholder alignment activities
  
Ensure solution quality, governance, and alignment with enterprise architecture
  
Support change management, training, and user enablement across global organisations
  
Follow market trends and best practices within CRM, customer engagement, and digital customer experiences
  
  

We believe you have
  
Experience working as a Product Manager, Application Manager, Business Analyst, Project Manager or similar role within CRM platforms
  
Experience working with CRM solutions (Microsoft Dynamics 365 preferred, others relevant)
  
Strong understanding of sales, marketing, and customer service processes
  
Experience working in digital transformation, CRM implementation, or business development initiatives
  
Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
  
Experience facilitating workshops and driving cross-functional collaboration
  
Excellent communication skills in English and Swedish
  
  

What we offer you
  
A key role in driving Nederman's customer engagement and digital transformation journey, a strong international network, continuous development opportunities, and a modern workplace in Helsingborg.
  
Apply now
  
Join us in shaping the future of customer engagement and CRM at Nederman and become part of our clean air journey!
  
We apply continuous selection, so don't wait to submit your application.

title: Product Marketing Manager GTM specialist
description:
At ABAX, Product Marketing isn't just a function – it's a strategic imperative and a direct driver of our growth. We are making a significant investment in Product Marketing capacity because we recognize its pivotal function as the driving force behind getting our innovative products to market and ensuring their sustained success.
  
You will be joining a team that acts as
  
A true enabler of sales and an accelerator of adoption.
  
The voice of the customer, masterminding compelling messaging rooted in pain point resolution.
  
A bridge-builder, fostering crucial collaboration between Product, Tech, Commercial, and Marketing teams.
  
A catalyst in tech sales, ensuring our products cut through the digital noise and establish an authentic signal in the market.
  
  

This is a unique opportunity to take our existing Go-To-Market GTM processes and make them your own. To help support our growth into Asset Tracking, new domains and AI, you will play a critical role in commercialising new product updates and domains to ensure that ABAX stands out with an authentic and expert-led voice.
  
What You’ll Work On
  
As our Product Marketing Manager, you will be at the forefront of our product lifecycle, ensuring our innovations reach and resonate with our target markets. Your responsibilities will include:
  
**Strategic GTM Leadership:**  Lead and execute comprehensive Go-to-Market (GTM) strategies for new products, features, and solution offerings, ensuring successful launches and market penetration together with the marketing team.
  
**Masterful Messaging & Positioning:**  Develop market-leading positioning and differentiated messaging that translates complex technical features into clear, compelling, and customer-centric value propositions across our product portfolio.
  
**Sales & Commercial Enablement:**  Create powerful sales enablement tools, impactful marketing content, and compelling collateral that equip our field sales and commercial teams for maximum effectiveness.
  
**Customer & Market Advocacy:**  Act as the voice of the market within ABAX, conducting in-depth primary and secondary research on customer insights, market trends, and competitor activities (including telematics, fleet management, and cloud providers) to inform product strategy and identify new opportunities. You'll understand and leverage competitor weaknesses.
  
**Cross-functional Collaboration:**  Facilitate effective communication, alignment, and evangelism across Product, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Leadership teams, bridging critical gaps to ensure shared understanding and success.
  
**Thought Leadership & Evangelism:**  Contribute to and execute expert-led thought leadership initiatives, evangelizing ABAX products to analysts, prospects, and customers through meetings, webinars, conferences, and trade shows.
  
**Performance Insight:**  Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to track product adoption and usage growth, evaluating the impact of PMM efforts on market performance and identifying areas for optimization.
  
  

What We're Looking For
  
5+ years of progressive Product Marketing experience, with at least 2 years focused on G2M for SaaS / B2B / telematics or Fleet Management / Asset Tracking market, and direct collaboration with field sales & marketing teams.
  
Proven experience in a B2B SaaS or tech environment; exposure to telematics, IoT, or asset tracking industries is a significant advantage.
  
A strategic, analytical thinker with a pragmatic mindset and a strong customer-centric approach.
  
Demonstrated ability to manage multiple complex projects in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
  
Exceptional communication (written and verbal) and presentation skills, with the ability to articulate complex concepts clearly and persuasively to diverse audiences.
  
A natural collaborator who thrives in cross-functional team settings and can build strong relationships.
  
You are well-organized, detail-oriented, and excellent at prioritizing tasks.
  
You are a dedicated team player who values open, continuous feedback on performance.
  
You are someone who expects to be challenged and is always looking for ways to work smarter.
  
  

Practical Details
  
**Start Date:** After summer
  
**Work Extent:** Full-time
  
**Location:** Stockholm
  
We believe great collaboration happens in person. As an office-first company, we expect our employees to spend the majority of their working week in the office, where we learn from each other, solve problems together, and build strong relationships as a team.
  
Background Check and Reference Verification
  
Successful employment is contingent upon ABAX receiving satisfactory references.
  
As part of our hiring process, we perform a digital reference check through RefApp, an advanced online solution for managing this procedure.
  
Please be aware that a background check may be conducted simultaneously with the reference check.
  
Equal Opportunities
  
At ABAX, we are dedicated to creating an inclusive environment for all our colleagues. This commitment extends to ensuring that our recruitment practices and processes are as inclusive as possible. We encourage applicants from all backgrounds to join us in strengthening our focus on equality and diversity in the workplace.
  
About ABAX
  
ABAX is a leading European telematics IoT platform offering connected mobility solutions for vehicle tracking, tool tracking, and equipment control. Our mission is to deliver mobility data insights that empower people to do more with less.
  
With over 500,000 tracked assets and 40,000 customers, ABAX delivers reliable and powerful solutions for businesses relying on physical operations. Our advanced platform transforms customer needs into actionable insights and automated reporting, driving efficiency and operational excellence.
  
We operate across Europe, with over 350 employees working from our facilities in Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland, the Netherlands, Belgium, Poland, and the UK. Our Head Office is in Larvik, Norway.

title: Senior QA Engineer / Test Automation Specialist
description:
Applications are considered on a rolling basis
  
Malmö
  
On-site
  
  

Applications are considered on a rolling basis
  
Malmö
  
On-site
  
Job Description
  
  

About SportAdmin
  
  

SportAdmin is part of Lime Technologies, one of Sweden’s most loved SaaS companies. We build solutions that make life easier for sports clubs and associations. Our products are trusted by 150,000 users every single day – including our popular SportAdmin App. We’re passionate about creating tools that empower communities and simplify administration.
  
  

The Role
  
  

We are looking for an experienced Senior QA Engineer / Test Automation Specialist to join us on an exciting journey: Moving from a manual testing process to building a modern test automation platform that makes it easy to build, ship, and run services quickly, securely, and reliably. You will play a key role in shaping our testing strategy and building the foundation that ensures quality across our products - leveraging AI tools and automation to work smarter.
  
  

What it’s like to work here
  
  

At SportAdmin, we believe testers are more than bug hunters – they are quality advocates and problem solvers. You’ll work closely with developers and product teams to design pragmatic solutions, automate where it matters most, and make testing an integral part of our development process. We're an AI-first team, which means we leverage AI everywhere where it makes sense to do so. We encourage experimentation, long-term thinking, and writing clean, maintainable test code. You’ll have the freedom to influence architecture and testing practices while enjoying a collaborative and fun work environment.
  
  

Your Mission
  
  

* Lead the transition from manual testing to automated testing.
* Build and maintain an AI-assisted test automation platform that accelerates development and improves reliability.
* Collaborate with developers to integrate testing into CI/CD pipelines.
* Ensure our products meet the highest standards of quality and performance.


What we’re looking for
  
  

* Strong experience in test automation frameworks and tools.
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Octopus Cloud).
* Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS preferred).
* Curiosity and enthusiasm for using AI tools to boost quality and speed.
* Ability to design and implement scalable test strategies for complex SaaS products.
* A mindset focused on quality, speed, and reliability.


Perks & Benefits
  
  

* Flexible working hours and hybrid work options.
* Generous wellness allowance and health benefits.
* Fun team activities and company events.
* Modern office in central Malmö.
* The culture and perks of being part of Lime Technologies – including Lime Camp, hackathons, and a strong focus on personal growth.


Location
  
  

Malmö, Sweden (Hybrid work possible)
  
  

Ready to apply?
  
  

If this sounds like you, apply today and help us build the future of testing at SportAdmin!
  
  

About the company
  
  

Making it easier for kids and young people to thrive in association life by reducing administrative burdens for organizations. We help clubs focus on what matters – creating meaningful activities and experiences.
  
  

Want to make a difference? Join us and contribute today!
  
  

Pernilla Möller | Contact Person
